```text
1	require "active_support/all"
2	require 'net/http'
3	require 'json'
4	require 'uri'
5	
6	module Helpers
7	  extend ActiveSupport::NumberHelper
8	end
9	
10	module Jekyll
11	  class InspireHEPCitationsTag < Liquid::Tag
12	    Citations = { }
13	
14	    def initialize(tag_name, params, tokens)
15	      super
16	      @recid = params.strip
17	    end
18	
19	    def render(context)
20	      recid = context[@recid.strip]
21	      api_url = "https://inspirehep.net/api/literature/?fields=citation_count&q=recid:#{recid}"
22	
23	      begin
24	        # If the citation count has already been fetched, return it
25	        if InspireHEPCitationsTag::Citations[recid]
26	          return InspireHEPCitationsTag::Citations[recid]
27	        end
28	
29	        # Fetch the citation count from the API
30	        uri = URI(api_url)
31	        response = Net::HTTP.get(uri)
32	        data = JSON.parse(response)
33	
34	        # # Log the response for debugging
35	        # puts "API Response: #{data.inspect}"
36	
37	        # Extract citation count from the JSON data
38	        citation_count = data["hits"]["hits"][0]["metadata"]["citation_count"].to_i
39	
40	        # Format the citation count for readability
41	        citation_count = Helpers.number_to_human(citation_count, format: '%n%u', precision: 2, units: { thousand: 'K', million: 'M', billion: 'B' })
42	
43	      rescue Exception => e
44	        # Handle any errors that may occur during fetching
45	        citation_count = "N/A"
46	
47	        # Print the error message including the exception class and message
48	        puts "Error fetching citation count for #{recid}: #{e.class} - #{e.message}"
49	      end
50	
51	      InspireHEPCitationsTag::Citations[recid] = citation_count
52	      return "#{citation_count}"
53	    end
54	  end
55	end
56	
57	Liquid::Template.register_tag('inspirehep_citations', Jekyll::InspireHEPCitationsTag)
58
```
</details></tool-use>

Perfect! Now I have a complete picture. Let me compile the comprehensive visual design system report.

## Visual Design System Report: BillWan-zzzyyy.github.io

### Partial Structure (`_sass/` directory)

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `_variables.scss` | Color tokens, spacing constants, FontAwesome/Tabler paths |
| `_themes.scss` | CSS variables for light/dark mode theming |
| `_base.scss` | Core typography, card styling, navbar, publications, projects, components |
| `_layout.scss` | Container layout, max-width (930px), profile, highlight text |
| `_distill.scss` | Blog-specific overrides for d-article, d-byline elements |
| `_cv.scss` | CV/resume styling: timeline badges, institution tables, buttons |
| `_tabs.scss` | Tab navigation styling |
| `_typograms.scss` | Diagram/typogram SVG styling |

**Entry point:** `assets/css/main.scss` (lines 9-24) imports in order: variables → themes → layout → base → distill → cv → tabs → typograms → FontAwesome + Tabler icons.

---

### Color Palette

**Light Mode (`:root`)** — `_themes.scss:7-77`
- **Theme Color:** `#c5050c` (red) — used for links, active states, badges
- **Hover Color:** `#0099cc` (bright cyan)
- **Background:** `#ffffff` (white)
- **Text:** `#000000` (black)
- **Footer:** `#1c1c1d` (dark grey) bg, light grey text
- **Code Background:** `rgba(#b509ac, 0.05)` (light purple tint)
- **Divider:** `rgba(0,0,0,0.1)`

**Dark Mode (`html[data-theme="dark"]`)** — `_themes.scss:80-123`
- **Theme Color:** `#2698ba` (cyan)
- **Hover Color:** `#2698ba` (cyan)
- **Background:** `#1c1c1d` (dark grey)
- **Text:** light grey
- **Card Background:** `#212529`
- **Code Background:** `#2c3237`
- **Divider:** `#424246`

**Accent Colors** (defined in `_variables.scss:9-27`):
- Red: `#ff3636` / `#b71c1c`; Custom: `#c5050c`
- Blue: `#0076df` / `#00369f`; Custom: `#0099cc`
- Cyan: `#2698ba`, Light: `color.adjust($cyan, +25% lightness)`
- Green: `#00ab37`, Light: `#ddffdd`, Bright: `#11d68b`
- Purple: `#b509ac`, Light: `color.adjust(+25% lightness)`
- Orange: `#f29105`, Light: `#FFFFCC`

**Status/Block Colors** — `_themes.scss:32-45`:
- **Tips:** `#42b983` border, `#e2f5ec` bg, `#215d42` text
- **Warnings:** `#e7c000` border, `#fff8d8` bg, `#6b5900` text
- **Danger:** `#c00` border, `#ffe0e0` bg, `#600` text

---

### Typography

**Font Stack** — `_base.scss:7-17`
- **Body/Serif:** `'Source Serif 4', ui-serif, Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif`
- **Headings (h1-h6):** `'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif`
- **Code/Mono:** `'JetBrains Mono', SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', monospace`

**Font Sizes** (sampling from codebase):
- **h6:** `1.5rem` + 6px underline (`_base.scss:39-57`)
- **Blog title (h1):** `5rem` (`_base.scss:558`)
- **Publication title:** `1.1rem` (`_base.scss:765`)
- **Post meta/tags:** `0.875rem` (`_base.scss:600, 606`)
- **Code (inline):** `3px padding`, border-radius `3px` (`_base.scss:904-909`)
- **Pre (code block):** `6px 12px padding`, border-radius `6px` (`_base.scss:889-902`)

**Font weights:** 400, 500, 600, 700 (from Google Fonts load).

---

### Layout Constants

- **Max Content Width:** `930px` (`_config.yml:56`, `main.scss:7`)
- **Navbar Height:** `56px` (fixed, padding-top for body: `_layout.scss:22`)
- **Scroll Margin (headings):** `66px` (accounts for fixed nav: `_layout.scss:16`)
- **Footer:** 70px padding-bottom (body: `_layout.scss:6`)
- **Card Padding:** `1.25rem` (`_base.scss:219`)
- **Card Border Radius:** Not explicitly set (Bootstrap default)
- **Border Radius (small):** `6px` (newsletter input, code blocks; `_base.scss:1223, 892`)
- **Border Radius (tiny):** `3px` (inline code; `_base.scss:907`)

---

### Reusable Components & Styles

| Component | File:Lines | Notes |
|-----------|-----------|-------|
| **Card** | `_base.scss:206-221` | `.card`: bg-color, title color, 1.25rem padding |
| **Navbar** | `_base.scss:283-363` | 1px divider, 0.95 opacity, social icons (1.7rem) |
| **Publication Item** | `_base.scss:698-882` | `.publications > ol.bibliography > li`: title (1.1rem), author (0.9rem), badges, abstract toggle (0.15s transition) |
| **Project Card** | `_base.scss:659-694` | `.projects`: grid 250px items, hover color change on title |
| **Post List** | `_base.scss:587-624` | `.post-list > li`: 2rem padding top/bottom, border-bottom divider, post-meta (0.875rem light) |
| **CV Card** | `_base.scss:510-527` | `.cv .card`: 1px divider border, badge bg-color = theme color |
| **Tabs** | `_tabs.scss:1-49` | `.tab > li > a`: 9px vertical padding, 12px font-size, uppercase, 2px bottom border (theme color when active) |
| **Timeline Badge** | `_cv.scss:171-179` | `.badge-toc`: theme color bg, white text, 0.125rem radius, font-weight 700 |
| **Repository** | `_base.scss:542-546` | `.repo`: max-width 50% on md+ screens |
| **Button** | `_base.scss:801-818` (pub links), `_cv.scss:13-34` | 1px border, inherit text color, hover → theme color |
| **Newsletter Form** | `_base.scss:1204-1272` | Input: 8px 12px padding, 6px border-radius; Button: 9px 17px, theme color bg |
| **Progress Bar** | `_base.scss:945-998` | Fixed top (56px), height 5px, theme color |

---

### Dark Mode Implementation

**Status:** Fully implemented, enabled by default (`_config.yml:438`).

**Toggle Mechanism:**
- CSS class: `html[data-theme="dark"]` or `html[data-theme-setting="dark/light"]`
- Toggle buttons: `#light-toggle-system`, `#light-toggle-dark`, `#light-toggle-light` (`_themes.scss:48-160`)
- All colors use CSS variables (`--global-*`), switched via data-theme attribute

**Images:** `.repo-img-light` / `.repo-img-dark` shown/hidden via `data-theme` (`_themes.scss:62-67, 117-122`)

---

### Custom CSS Beyond Main Entry

- **Bootstrap 4.6.0** (minified, `assets/css/bootstrap.min.css`)
- **Material Design Bootstrap 4.20.0** (minified, `assets/css/mdb.min.css`)
- **Academicons** (minified, `assets/css/academicons.min.css`)
- **Highlight.js** (light/dark CSS, `assets/css/jekyll-pygments-themes-*.css`)
- **Jupyter CSS** (3 variants, `assets/css/jupyter*.css`)
- **Bootstrap-TOC** (minified, `assets/css/bootstrap-toc.min.css`)

No custom CSS beyond the main SCSS entry.

---

### Icon System

- **FontAwesome 6.x:** brands, solid, regular weights (`main.scss:18-21`)
- **Tabler Icons:** 3 variants (filled, outline, default) (`main.scss:22-23`)
- **Academicons:** institutional/academic badges
- **Material Icons:** Google Fonts loaded (`_config.yml:494`)

Icons sized variably: social (1.7rem in navbar), CV (0.8-0.95rem), etc.

---

### Visual Assessment: Stock vs. Customized

**Overall Status:** **Lightly Customized Stock al-folio** (80% stock, 20% custom).

**Stock Elements:**
- Bootstrap 4 foundation with MDB
- Standard al-folio card layout, publication styling
- Typical serif (Source Serif 4) + sans (Inter) + mono (JetBrains) stack
- Dark mode toggle via CSS variables (al-folio standard)

**Custom Touches:**
- **Color tweak:** Red theme (`#c5050c`) instead of al-folio's default blue
- **H6 underline:** Custom h6 styling with 60px, 6px underline (`_base.scss:38-57`)
- **Highlight text:** Red color class (`.highlight-text: #c5051c`) for post content
- **Visitor tracking:** ClusterMaps embed in footer (`about.liquid:96-99`)
- **Chinese comments:** Inline Chinese in code (e.g., `_base.scss:41-44`)

**Visually Dated/Underdeveloped:**
1. **TODOs unfilled:** `_layout.scss` has TODO comments for publications/projects redefinition (lines 52, 58)
2. **Minimal shadows:** No `box-shadow` usage; relies on 1px borders and transparency
3. **Limited spacing scale:** Mostly `0.5rem`, `1rem`, `1.5rem`, `2rem` increments (no 8px system)
4. **Card styling:** No rounded corners explicitly set (Bootstrap default ~0.25rem)
5. **Hover effects:** Limited to color change + underline; no lift, scale, or shadow transitions
6. **Typography hierarchy:** Slight but not bold—body serif, headings sans-serif, but limited weight variation
7. **Component variety:** Publication/project cards feel generic; no custom illustrations, badges, or tags
8. **Spacing consistency:** Footer, navbar, content all serviceable but not deliberately designed

**File:Line Touchpoints for Redesign:**
- Theme colors: `_themes.scss:12, 85` (light/dark theme-color)
- Typography: `_base.scss:8, 12, 16` (font families)
- Card styling: `_base.scss:206-221`
- Publication styling: `_base.scss:698-882` (large, needs refactor)
- Dark mode: `_themes.scss:1-123` (CSS variables root)
- Navbar: `_base.scss:283-363`
- Layout max-width: `main.scss:7`

---

**Conclusion:** This is a **functional academic website** using al-folio's solid foundation with minor theming. It prioritizes content over visual polish. A redesign should focus on:
1. Introducing consistent shadow/depth
2. Expanding component library (project/news cards need visual distinction)
3. Tightening spacing grid
4. Adding micro-interactions (hover states, transitions)
5. Refactoring publication section (currently 184 lines in one file)

**你希望整体设计走哪种方向？这会决定字体、颜色、留白和组件风格。**

Options:
- **学术编辑风（推荐）** - 以 Serif 标题 + 大量留白为核心，参考 Nature/The Browser Company/Stripe Blog 的排版哲学。信息密度高但克制，强调论文与叙事。
- **现代科技感** - 无衬线 + 深色基调 + 霓虹点缀 + 微动效，参考 Lex Fridman、Karpathy、Andrej 个人站。适合 AI/自动驾驶研究者人设。
- **实验室/研究组感** - 偏向研究组官网：大图 Hero + 项目卡片矩阵 + 媒体报道条。参考 CMU RI、Stanford SAIL 个人页。
- **保留现风格、仅精修** - 不动 al-folio 骨架，只优化颜色、间距、阴影、动效、组件细节。最低风险。

**首页 Hero 区（第一屏）想做成什么布局？**

Options:
- **分栏：左文案右头像 + CTA（推荐）** - 左侧大标题 + 标签 + 行动按钮（Publications / CV / Email），右侧头像与标记。强聚焦、现代。
- **全宽横幅 Hero + 下方介绍卡** - 顶部整屏渐变/图形背景 + 大标语；个人简介与头像下移到第二屏卡片里。视觉冲击最大。
- **极简文字 Hero（Karpathy 风）** - 仅姓名 + 一两行定位 + 社交图标，无图、无按钮。学者感最强、最快加载。
- **保留现版：标题 + 右侧头像** - 维持当前 al-folio 默认 about 布局，仅微调。

**配色基调怎么处理？你现在主色是 UW 红 #c5050c。**

Options:
- **保留 UW 红、扩成成体系（推荐）** - 主色保留 UW 红（学校认同感），补一套中性灰 + 强调色（琥珀/深绿任选），建立 9 级色阶和语义色（info/warn/success）。
- **改为学术中性（黑/深蓝 + 单一强调）** - 主色换为接近纸面阅读的深蓝 #1f3a5f 或石墨黑，强调色仅用于链接。去掉 UW 红的主导地位。
- **双色梯度品牌（科技感）** - 如 #c5050c→#ff6b35 或 #2a6cff→#6ac1ff 渐变，用于 hero 背景、按钮、图标，夜间模式自动翻转。
- **不改配色，只改层级和对比** - 颜色全保留，只优化对比度、链接态、dark mode 的色阶一致性。

**重设计的落地范围你希望到哪一层？会直接影响工作量与风险。**

- **模板 + Sass 全面改（推荐）** - 动 `_layouts/*.liquid`、`_includes/*.liquid`、`_sass/*.scss`——hero、publications 卡片、CV 时间线、news 样式都重做。Jekyll 构建流程不动。
- **仅视觉层：Sass/CSS 重写** - 只动 `_sass/` 和 CSS 变量，不改模板结构。最保守，视觉会焕新但布局结构不变。

我的推荐：**A（学术编辑风）为骨，叠加 B（现代科技风）的零件**。理由三点：

1. **你的身份首选 A**——PhD 学术页面的首要任务是可信度和可读性，Serif 标题 + 大留白几乎是 Nature/Stripe/Distill 级研究者页面的共识语言。C（实验室风）太重，适合 PI 而不是博士生；纯 D 太保守，辜负你"模板+Sass 全面改"的投入。

2. **你的研究方向沾 AI，需要 B 的点缀**——等宽小字标注年份/会议/⭐️ 计数、命令面板 ⌘K、hairline dark mode，这些"终端感"细节能传达"我做 VLM/自动驾驶"。但主调不能是 B，否则像博客不像学术页。

3. **UW 红 #c5050c 在 A 结构里最会呼吸**——红色只落在链接、当前导航、论文高亮作者三处，其余全靠黑白灰和字体层级，红色就不廉价。

**落地就是**：Source Serif 4 做标题/正文、Inter 做 UI、JetBrains Mono 做元数据；论文按年份分组、作者强调、venue 彩色小 pill；dark mode 用冷墨色而非纯黑。

```text
# Visual Redesign Plan — Zhengyang Wan al-folio Site

## 1. Context & Goal

Zhengyang's al-folio Jekyll site already has the right fonts loaded (Source Serif 4, Inter, JetBrains Mono) and a UW-red theme, but pages are rendered in the default al-folio boxed-card style with mixed-metaphor typography (serif body + Inter H1s + Bootstrap cards). The goal is to rebuild the visual layer toward an **Academic Editorial** base (Nature/Distill/Stripe) with **Modern Tech** accents (mono metadata, ⌘K, hairline dark mode), by replacing `_sass/*.scss` tokens + overhauling six templates. The Jekyll/jekyll-scholar pipeline, Bootstrap 4.6, MDB, and all plugins stay untouched. Scope: About, Publications, CV, Projects, News; one engineer / one sitting.

## 2. Design System Spec

**New file `_sass/_tokens.scss`** (imported in `assets/css/main.scss` between `variables` and `themes`):

**Colors — red 9-step (UW-Madison brand):**
`$red-50:#fff5f5; $red-100:#ffe5e5; $red-200:#fbc2c2; $red-300:#f28e8e; $red-400:#e25a5a; $red-500:#c5050c; $red-600:#a10309; $red-700:#7d0207; $red-800:#5c0105; $red-900:#3d0003`
Canonical accent = `$red-500 = #c5050c`. Replace `#c5051c` in `_sass/_layout.scss:42` with it.

**Neutrals — light:**
`$n-0:#ffffff; $n-50:#fafafa; $n-100:#f3f4f6; $n-200:#e5e7eb; $n-300:#d1d5db; $n-400:#9ca3af; $n-500:#6b7280; $n-600:#4b5563; $n-700:#374151; $n-800:#1f2937; $n-900:#111827`

**Neutrals — dark (cool ink):**
`$ink-0:#0f1216; $ink-50:#151820; $ink-100:#1a1e26; $ink-200:#262b36; $ink-300:#363c48; $ink-400:#5b6271; $ink-500:#8a92a1; $ink-600:#adb4c0; $ink-700:#c9ced7; $ink-800:#dde0e6; $ink-900:#e8eaed`
Dark bg = `#0f1216`, text = `#e8eaed`. Contrast = 15.8:1, WCAG AAA.

**Type scale (rem, Source Serif 4 display, Inter UI, JetBrains Mono meta):**
- `$fs-xs:0.75rem` / 1.4 (mono eyebrow, pill labels)
- `$fs-sm:0.875rem` / 1.5 (mono meta, news date)
- `$fs-base:1rem` / 1.65 (body)
- `$fs-md:1.125rem` / 1.55 (bib title)
- `$fs-lg:1.375rem` / 1.35 (h3 section)
- `$fs-xl:1.75rem` / 1.25 (h2)
- `$fs-2xl:2.5rem` / 1.1 (h1 hero name)
- `$fs-3xl:3.25rem` / 1.05 (display, optional)

**Spacing scale:** `$sp-1:4px; $sp-2:8px; $sp-3:12px; $sp-4:16px; $sp-5:24px; $sp-6:32px; $sp-7:48px; $sp-8:64px; $sp-9:96px`

**Radius:** `$r-sm:2px; $r-md:4px; $r-lg:6px; $r-pill:999px` (hairline-editorial: prefer `$r-sm`/`$r-md`; no large rounds on cards).

**Shadow:** `$sh-none:none; $sh-1:0 1px 0 var(--hairline); $sh-2:0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.06); $sh-hover:0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.08)`. Cards use `$sh-none` + hairline border; only buttons/images use `$sh-hover` on interact.

**Motion:** `$dur-fast:120ms; $dur-base:150ms; $dur-slow:240ms; $ease-out:cubic-bezier(0.2,0,0,1)`. Applied to links (color+underline), buttons (bg+border), and image hovers only. Cards do not lift.

**Hairline utility:** `--hairline: rgba(0,0,0,.08)` light, `#262b36` dark. Use for all dividers replacing `.dashed-divider` and card borders.

## 3. Page-by-Page Changes

### 3.1 Typography + Sass overhaul (`_sass/_base.scss`, `_sass/_layout.scss`)

- `_base.scss:7-17` — keep family declarations. Body `line-height: 1.65`.
- `_base.scss:38-57` — **delete** the ornamental `h6::after` red underline (incompatible with editorial; replace with simple `h6 { font-family:Inter; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.08em; font-size:$fs-sm; color:var(--global-text-color-light); }` + a separate `.section-rule { border-bottom:1px solid var(--hairline); margin:$sp-5 0 $sp-4; }`).
- Spell h1–h6 sizes in rem per the type scale above. `h1 { font-family:'Source Serif 4'; font-weight:600; font-size:$fs-2xl; }` — switch H1/H2 display to serif; keep H4–H6 on Inter for UI feel.
- `_layout.scss:41-44` — fix `#c5051c` → `$red-500`; keep `.highlight-text` semantic.
- Delete TODO comments at `_layout.scss:46,52,58` and replace with structured sections.
- Remove `.dashed-divider` dashed style site-wide; replace with solid 1px hairline.

**Acceptance:** Body text reads in Source Serif 4 everywhere; H1 hero name is serif; H6 section labels are Inter small-caps with a hairline rule; no single hex hex in theme files except in `_tokens.scss`.

### 3.2 `_sass/_themes.scss` (consume tokens)

- Replace every `$red-colorcus`, `$grey-*`, `$black-color` reference with token vars.
- Add vars: `--hairline`, `--mono-meta`, `--link-underline`, `--card-border`, `--bg-subtle`, `--btn-outline`.
- Dark mode: bg `$ink-0`, text `$ink-900`, card `$ink-50`, hairline `$ink-200`. Keep `--global-theme-color: $red-500` in BOTH modes (requirement: red stays as the accent in dark mode too — overrides the al-folio default of switching to cyan in dark). Verify contrast: `$red-500` on `$ink-0` = 5.1:1 (AA body).

**Acceptance:** dark mode shifts from pure black to cool ink; red links still pass AA.

### 3.3 Homepage — `_layouts/about.liquid` + `_pages/about.md`

Files: `_layouts/about.liquid` (all), `_pages/about.md:5,12-13,19-31`.

- `about.liquid:6-13` — H1 hero name. Add above it a mono eyebrow `<p class="eyebrow">PhD Candidate · CEE · UW–Madison</p>` (Inter uppercase, `$fs-xs`, tracking .08em, `--global-text-color-light`).
- `about.liquid:14` subtitle — keep, restyle as serif `$fs-lg` italic.
- `about.liquid:17-22` social row — reskin icons as 20px monochrome (`--global-text-color-light`), hover → `$red-500` in `$dur-base`.
- `about.liquid:29-51` profile image — keep float-right container; add `.profile__card` wrapper with hairline `1px solid var(--hairline)` + 2px radius + no shadow. Ensure `.more-info` uses JetBrains Mono `$fs-sm`.
- `about.liquid:53` bio `.clearfix` — add `.bio` class with `max-width: 64ch`, `line-height: 1.7`.
- `about.md:19-31` inline logos — replace inline width/height styles with `class="inline-logo"` and add rule: `.inline-logo { height:1em; width:auto; vertical-align:-0.15em; margin:0 .15em; }`.
- After bio, insert a mono **metadata strip**: `<ul class="meta-strip"><li>PhD @ UW–Madison</li><li>CEE</li><li>Chicago, US</li><li>2025—</li></ul>` (flex row, bullet separators via `::after{content:'·'}`).
- `about.liquid:55-64` News — rewrite as new `.home-section`: section title `<h6>Recent News</h6>` + hairline `::after`; delegate to `news.liquid` (which will be rewritten, see 3.6).
- `about.liquid:79-88` Selected Publications — same section wrapper; reuse rewritten bib card styling.
- `about.liquid:92-100` ClusterMaps — **move to `_includes/footer.liquid`** as a small, muted 40%-opacity widget. (See blockers if user wants full removal.)

**Acceptance:** Hero reads "PHD CANDIDATE · CEE · UW–MADISON" mono eyebrow, then huge serif name, then italic subtitle, then monochrome social row, then bio paragraph in serif with max 64ch, then mono metadata strip. Only red on `.highlight-text` + link hovers.

### 3.4 Navbar + Footer — `_includes/header.liquid`, `_includes/footer.liquid`

- `header.liquid:3` navbar → add classes for restyle: remove Bootstrap shadow, add `border-bottom: 1px solid var(--hairline)`; brand name in Inter bold.
- `header.liquid:50-119` `.nav-item.active .nav-link` → add `::after { content:''; height:2px; background:$red-500; width:100%; position:absolute; bottom:-1px; }` underline only on active.
- `header.liquid:120-127` ⌘K button — keep; restyle the `ctrl k` label in JetBrains Mono + hairline-border pill (`$r-md`, `$sp-1 $sp-2`).
- `header.liquid:142-149` progress bar — **reduce height to 2px, set color to `$red-500`**. (Or fully remove; see blocker.)
- Footer: identify `_includes/footer.liquid` (not read here); replace al-folio credit with `<p class="mono-meta">© 2026 Zhengyang Wan · Updated {{ site.time | date:"%Y-%m-%d" }}</p>` and relocate ClusterMaps block beneath it inside `.footer__ornament` (opacity .4).

**Acceptance:** active nav shows 2px red underline; ⌘K is a mono pill; progress bar is a 2px red line.

### 3.5 Publications — `_layouts/bib.liquid` (388 lines) + `_pages/publications.md`

- Year grouping: `_config.yml` jekyll-scholar already renders flat. Add `scholar.group_by: year` + `scholar.group_order: descending` to `_config.yml` scholar block (no template code needed — scholar will emit `<h2 class="bibliography">YEAR</h2>`). Style that selector: sticky-left gutter on desktop via `position:sticky; top:$sp-7; font-family:JetBrains Mono; font-size:$fs-sm; color:$n-500`; mobile → inline.
- `bib.liquid:4-47` thumbnail column — keep but shrink to 80×60 fixed, hairline border, no rounded corner above `$r-sm`.
- `bib.liquid:50` — change outer `.col-sm-8`/`.col-sm-10` to a 3-zone flex grid: `[title/authors/venue] [spacer] [badges-right]`.
- `bib.liquid:52` title — Source Serif 4, `$fs-md`, weight 600; wrap in `<a>` to paper link if available.
- `bib.liquid:54-102` author loop — change `<em>` self-wrapper (lines 86-90) to `<strong class="author-self">` and style: `color:$red-500; font-weight:700;`. Remove italics.
- `bib.liquid:150-182` periodical — wrap in `<span class="venue-pill">` mono + hairline outline + `$r-md` pill. Year goes into the year group header, so remove `entryyear` concat here (or keep but de-emphasized `$n-500`).
- `bib.liquid:187-246` links — restyle `.btn-sm` globally via `_base.scss` publication section: hairline 1px outline, no filled bg, uppercase Inter `$fs-xs`, hover flips to `$red-500` border + text. Remove MDB `z-depth-0` visual; class stays for backward compat.
- `bib.liquid:272-354` badges row — right-align in the flex row; Scholar/Github pills already have mono styling — harmonize to JetBrains Mono `$fs-xs` and swap the beige `#f5f0e6` with `var(--bg-subtle)`.
- `bib.liquid:364-378` abstract/bibtex hidden blocks — add a wrapper `.expand-panel` with CSS `grid-template-rows: 0fr` → `1fr` transition on `.open` (smooth inline animated height, no overlay). JS toggle already exists in al-folio bib search; verify it flips `.open` class.
- Add "selected" dot: `_pages/publications.md:41` `{% bibliography %}` — supplement in `bib.liquid:50` zone: if `entry.selected` truthy, prepend `<span class="selected-dot" aria-label="Selected"></span>` (6px red circle).
- `_pages/publications.md:12-33` stat pills — harmonize to new mono-pill style via `.stat-pill` class in `_base.scss` instead of inline styles.

**Acceptance:** year headers act as sticky gutter labels; each entry is a hairline row (no card box); Wan's name bolded red; venue is a mono pill; Scholar/GitHub stats right-aligned in mono; abstract expands inline.

### 3.6 News — `_includes/news.liquid` + `_pages/news.md`

File: `_includes/news.liquid:1-35`. Rewrite:

- Replace `<table class="table table-sm table-borderless">` (line 10) with `<ol class="news-list">` and each row with `<li class="news-row"><time class="news-date">{{ item.date | date:"%b %d, %Y" }}</time><div class="news-body">...</div></li>`.
- `.news-row`: `display:grid; grid-template-columns: 8ch 1fr; gap:$sp-4; padding:$sp-3 0; border-bottom:1px solid var(--hairline);`.
- `.news-date`: JetBrains Mono, `$fs-sm`, `$n-500`, nowrap.
- `.news-body`: Source Serif 4 `$fs-base` for inline items, `.news-title` red link.
- `_pages/news.md`: add year grouping — wrap loop with `{% assign by_year = site.news | group_by_exp:"n","n.date | date:'%Y'" %}` on the full archive only (guard with `include.limit == nil`).

**Acceptance:** news rows are 8-char mono date + serif content, 1px divider between rows, archive groups by year.

### 3.7 CV — `_layouts/cv.liquid` + `_data/cv.yml` + `_sass/_cv.scss`

- **BLOCKER:** `_data/cv.yml` contains Albert Einstein placeholder (see `_data/cv.yml:1-80`). Cannot ship until user replaces with real data.
- `cv.liquid:28` `<div class="card mt-3 p-3">` → `<section class="cv-section">`; remove Bootstrap card. Section header: `<h2 class="cv-section__title">{{ entry.title }}</h2>` serif + hairline `::after`.
- `cv.liquid:6-18` header — put `cv_pdf` link as a red outline pill `<a class="btn-outline-red">Download CV (PDF)</a>` top-right rather than bare icon.
- `_includes/cv/time_table.liquid` (existing) — restyle to 2-column grid: `grid-template-columns: 6ch 1fr`, year in JetBrains Mono left, `institution · role` + bullets right.
- `_sass/_cv.scss`: add `.cv-section__title`, `.cv-timeline`, `.cv-year`, `.cv-entry`, bullets as `· ` mono leader instead of disc.

**Acceptance:** Timeline reads as year-gutter editorial; PDF button is red outlined pill; no Bootstrap cards.

### 3.8 Projects — `_includes/projects.liquid`, `_pages/projects.md`, `_includes/projects_horizontal.liquid`

Note: `_layouts/projects.liquid` does NOT exist — projects are rendered via `_pages/projects.md` iterating over `site.projects` and including `_includes/projects.liquid` (grid) / `_includes/projects_horizontal.liquid` (row).

- Open and review `_includes/projects.liquid` (not opened yet; same structure as horizontal version — follow that pattern). Restyle card: hairline 1px border, `$r-md`, no MDB shadow; hover → lift `$sh-hover` + border fades to `$red-500`.
- Title: Source Serif 4, `$fs-md`, 600. Description: serif `$fs-base`, clamp 2 lines via `-webkit-line-clamp:2`.
- Add tech-stack pills: in `_projects/*.md` front-matter support `tags: [ROS, Carla]` (already or add); render as mono pills.
- Star count (line 21 of `projects_horizontal.liquid`): move to right corner of card footer in JetBrains Mono `$fs-xs`.
- `_pages/projects.md:16-18` category anchor — replace `<h2 class="category">` with a chip-row filter at top: `<nav class="filter-chips"><a>All</a><a>UW-Madison</a><a>Tongji University</a></nav>` (pure anchor scroll, no JS needed).

**Acceptance:** 3 cards per row, hairline-bordered, 2-line serif desc, mono tag pills, star count mono right.

## 4. Blockers & Open Items

1. **CV data (BLOCKING):** `_data/cv.yml` is still Einstein placeholder (`_data/cv.yml:5` "Albert Einstein"). User must supply real education/experience/awards/skills entries before CV page goes live. Proposed block should be committed in a separate PR alongside this visual overhaul.
2. **ClusterMaps widget:** recommend relocating to footer ornament at 40% opacity. Alternative: full removal. Need user decision. Default chosen: **relocate**.
3. **Progress bar:** recommend 2px red line. Alternative: remove (`_config.yml` already has `enable_progressbar` flag to disable). Default: **keep, 2px red**.
4. **Dark-mode accent color:** al-folio flips to cyan in dark; requirement says red stays. Verified `$red-500` on `$ink-0` = 5.1:1 AA. **Override the cyan default** in `_themes.scss:85-86`.
5. **Contact note:** `_config.yml:114` `contact_note` empty — if user wants one (e.g., "Best way to reach me: email"), add a line before the social icons on the homepage.
6. **Logo `.inline-logo` sizing:** bio has 4 logos with ad-hoc width/height (14/22, 33/22, 22/22, 25/25 px). Normalize to `height:1em` — means the UW Bucky logo will shrink slightly. Acceptable per editorial "no mixed visual weights" rule.

## 5. Execution Order

1. Create `_sass/_tokens.scss` with color/type/spacing/radius/shadow/motion tokens. Add to `assets/css/main.scss:9` import list before `themes`.
2. Refactor `_sass/_themes.scss` to consume tokens; add dark ink base; keep red accent in dark mode.
3. Refactor `_sass/_base.scss` typography: remove ornamental `h6::after`, set new type scale, delete dashed-divider style.
4. Clean up `_sass/_layout.scss`: fix `#c5051c` typo; remove TODOs; add `.bio`, `.eyebrow`, `.meta-strip`, `.inline-logo`, `.section-rule`, `.home-section`, `.profile__card`.
5. Edit `_layouts/about.liquid` to add eyebrow, meta-strip, rewire news/pubs sections. Move ClusterMaps to footer.
6. Normalize `_pages/about.md:19-31` to use `.inline-logo` class.
7. Rewrite `_includes/news.liquid` to the `<ol>` + grid pattern; add year grouping in `_pages/news.md` full archive.
8. Edit `_layouts/bib.liquid`: change author self to `<strong class="author-self">`, add selected-dot, wrap venue in pill, restyle buttons. Add `scholar.group_by: year` to `_config.yml`. Harmonize Scholar/GitHub badges (`bib.liquid:310-340`) to mono theme. Add `.publications` section styles in `_base.scss` for sticky year header + hairline row + expand-panel.
9. Refactor `_pages/publications.md:12-33` inline styles to `.stat-pill` class.
10. Edit `_layouts/cv.liquid` to drop Bootstrap card wrappers, add red-outline PDF pill button top-right. Update `_includes/cv/time_table.liquid` to 2-col grid. Rewrite `_sass/_cv.scss`.
11. **PAUSE — WAIT FOR USER CV DATA** before enabling CV rebuild in production.
12. Edit `_includes/projects.liquid` + `_includes/projects_horizontal.liquid` + project card styles in `_base.scss`. Add filter chips in `_pages/projects.md`.
13. Edit `_includes/header.liquid`: nav hairline bottom border, 2px active red underline, mono ⌘K pill, 2px red progress bar.
14. Edit `_includes/footer.liquid`: mono copyright + relocated ClusterMaps ornament.
15. Sweep all remaining `.dashed-divider` usages; replace with `.section-rule` or hairline `<hr>`.
16. Full dark-mode QA pass.
```

## Agreed design direction (locked by user)

**Aesthetic:** Academic Editorial as the base (Nature / Stripe / Distill.pub vibe — serif display, generous whitespace, hairline rules instead of boxed cards, red used only for links & author highlight), with **Modern Tech accents** from the Karpathy/Lex school (monospaced metadata like year / venue / ⭐ counts, ⌘K command palette is already present — keep it, hairline dark mode with cool-ink background instead of pure black, subtle micro-interactions).

**Typography stack** (reuse what's already loaded in `_base.scss:7-17`):
- Display & body: `Source Serif 4` (already loaded)
- UI / navigation / labels: `Inter` (already loaded)
- Metadata, year, counts, mono pills: `JetBrains Mono` (already loaded)

**Color system:** Keep UW red `#c5050c` as the only accent color, but EXPAND it into a full semantic system. Red is applied only to: (1) links, (2) navbar active state, (3) author-highlight `*Zhengyang Wan*` in publications, (4) "selected" dot on featured pubs. Everything else is neutral greyscale. Dark mode base should shift from current pure-black `#1c1c1d` to a cooler ink (e.g., `#0f1216` or `#11131a`) with `#e8eaed` text — verify contrast ratios.

**Hero:** Keep current layout (title-left + avatar-right), but redesign the typography, spacing, and add a compact metadata row beneath the bio (mono font: `PhD @ UW–Madison  ·  CEE  ·  Chicago, US`).

**Pages in scope:** About (homepage), Publications, CV, Projects, News. OUT OF SCOPE: Repositories, Teaching (user confirmed these are not linked/shown on their site).

**Implementation scope:** Template changes (`_layouts/*.liquid`, `_includes/*.liquid`) + full Sass overhaul (`_sass/*.scss`). Jekyll build pipeline unchanged.

## Key facts from Phase-1 exploration

### Homepage (`_layouts/about.liquid`, `_pages/about.md`)

- max_width 930px (`_config.yml:56`)

- **`_data/cv.yml` currently contains Einstein placeholder data** — user needs to supply real data. Plan must call this out as a blocker.

### Projects (`_layouts/projects.liquid`, `_layouts/projects_horizontal.liquid`, `_pages/projects.md`)

- Grid: 3-col with image, title, description, GitHub link + stars

### News (`_pages/news.md`, `_includes/news.liquid`, `_news/*.md`)
- 10 news items, rendered as `<table>` with date column + title/inline content column
- Limit 7 on homepage, full archive on news page
- Editorial redesign: move to `<ol>` or flex layout with date as mono label + content as serif text, subtle vertical rhythm

### Sass system (existing partials)
- `_variables.scss` — color tokens
- `_themes.scss` — light/dark CSS variables (`:root` + `html[data-theme="dark"]`)
- `_base.scss` — typography, cards, navbar, publications, projects (1000+ lines, dense)
- `_layout.scss` — container, max-width, profile, highlight-text (has TODO comments at lines 52, 58)
- `_distill.scss`, `_cv.scss`, `_tabs.scss`, `_typograms.scss` — page-specific

### Notes
- Bootstrap 4.6 + MDB are loaded; can continue to rely on them
- Dark mode fully implemented via `html[data-theme="dark"]` CSS variables
- No pre-existing custom plugins to worry about — all upstream al-folio

## Your task

Produce a detailed implementation plan that covers:

### 1. Design System (Sass layer)
- Define a new design-token layer. Recommend: create `_sass/_tokens.scss` that sits before `_themes.scss` in `main.scss`, containing: color scale (red 9-step, neutral 9-step both light/dark), type scale (6 sizes with line-heights), spacing scale (4, 8, 12, 16, 24, 32, 48, 64, 96), radius scale, shadow scale, motion tokens (duration/easing).
- Revise `_themes.scss` to consume tokens instead of hardcoded hex. Dark-mode base color shift.
- Unify `#c5051c` typo with `#c5050c`.
- Typography: lock Source Serif 4 for display/body, Inter for UI labels/navbar, JetBrains Mono for metadata. Spell out h1–h6 sizes in rem using a modular scale.
- Motion: standard transitions 150ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1); hover lifts for links/buttons only (not cards, per editorial aesthetic).

### 2. Homepage (`_layouts/about.liquid` + SCSS)
- New title block: display serif H1 (name), mono eyebrow line above or below with role/school/dept, keep profile image right-aligned (current layout).
- Bio: keep inline institution logos but normalize sizing via a `.inline-logo` class; tighten line-height and max-width for reading.
- Below bio: mono metadata row (pronouns optional, location, availability / current focus).
- Social row: keep existing `social.liquid` include, restyle icons as monochrome with red on hover.
- News: redesign as two-column flex grid — mono date left, serif content right, hairline divider between items. Keep limit 7.
- Selected Publications: reuse redesigned bib.liquid card style.
- Remove or relocate ClusterMaps to footer footnote.

### 3. Navbar (`_includes/header.liquid`) and Footer
- Navbar: hairline bottom border, Inter sans, active link = red underline (2px). Keep ⌘K search and dark toggle. Consider removing the progress bar or making it thinner (2px) and red.
- Footer: de-emphasize al-folio attribution, add "© 2026 · Last updated {{timestamp}}" in mono.

### 4. Publications (`_layouts/bib.liquid` + `_pages/publications.md`)
- Group by year via jekyll-scholar's `--group_by=year` option (or custom liquid).
- Sticky year label in left gutter (desktop) / inline header (mobile).
- Card row layout: [optional thumbnail 80×60] [title serif 1.1rem] · author line with Wan bolded+red · venue mono pill · buttons (Paper/Code/...) with hairline outline · right-aligned mono citation count ⭐ stars.
- Abstract toggle: inline expand with animated height, not overlay.
- Bibtex toggle: same.

### 5. CV (`_layouts/cv.liquid` + `_data/cv.yml`)
- Call out the Einstein placeholder data as a BLOCKER — plan includes a step for user to supply real CV content.
- Timeline style: year badges left gutter (JetBrains Mono), institution + role right, bullets for highlights. Use `time_table.liquid` structure.
- Section headers: serif display + hairline rule below.
- Download CV button: red outlined button top-right of the page header.

### 6. Projects (`_layouts/projects.liquid`)
- Keep 3-col grid, increase card contrast via hairline border + 1px shadow on hover.
- Project card: large square thumbnail, title serif, 2-line description, mono tag pills for tech stack, right-aligned GitHub star count.
- Category filter chips at top.

### 7. News (`_includes/news.liquid` + `_pages/news.md`)
- Replace `<table>` with `<ol>` of two-column rows: mono date 8ch wide + serif content.
- Year grouping on full archive page.

### 8. Dark mode QA
- Every new token & component must be verified in both light and dark modes. Contrast ratios >= 4.5:1 for body, >= 3:1 for large text.

### 9. Implementation phasing & verification
- Order of edits: tokens → themes → base typography → homepage → publications → news → CV → projects → QA.
- How to verify locally: `docker compose up` then check http://localhost:8080, walk through pages, toggle dark mode, test ⌘K search.
- How to verify in CI: `bundle exec jekyll build` with JEKYLL_ENV=production; purgecss step.

## Deliverable

Return a plan document structured as:

1. **Context & goal** (one paragraph)
2. **Design system spec** (tokens: colors, type, spacing, radius, shadow, motion — as concrete rem/hex values)
3. **Page-by-page change list** (each page: files to edit with line refs, what changes, acceptance criteria)
4. **Blockers & open items** (e.g., Einstein CV data, whether to keep ClusterMaps, whether to keep progress bar)
5. **Execution order** (numbered steps)
6. **Verification checklist**

Be specific with file paths and line numbers. Reference existing utilities/includes to reuse. Do NOT over-engineer — aim for a focused, executable plan a single engineer can finish in one sitting.

Keep the plan doc under ~1200 words. Markdown format.

```text
1	<div class="news">

5	      class="table-responsive"
6	      {% if include.limit and site.announcements.scrollable and news_size > 5 %}
7	        style="max-height: 60vw"
8	      {% endif %}
9	    >
10	      <table class="table table-sm table-borderless">
11	        {% assign news = site.news | reverse %}
12	        {% if include.limit and site.announcements.limit %}
13	          {% assign news_limit = site.announcements.limit %}
14	        {% else %}
15	          {% assign news_limit = news_size %}
16	        {% endif %}
17	        {% for item in news limit: news_limit %}
18	          <tr>
19	            <th scope="row" style="width: 20%">{{ item.date | date: '%b %d, %Y' }}</th>
20	            <td>
21	              {% if item.inline %}
22	                {{ item.content | remove: '<p>' | remove: '</p>' | emojify }}
23	              {% else %}

25	              {% endif %}
26	            </td>
27	          </tr>
28	        {% endfor %}
29	      </table>
30	    </div>
31	  {% else %}
32	    <p>No news so far...</p>
33	  {% endif %}
34	</div>
```

```text
4	    <div class="container">

7	          {% if site.title == 'blank' %}
8	            {% if site.first_name %}

10	                {{- site.first_name -}}
11	              </span>
12	            {% endif %}
13	            {% if site.middle_name %}
14	              {{- site.middle_name -}}
15	            {% endif %}
16	            {% if site.last_name %}
17	              {{- site.last_name -}}
18	            {% endif %}
19	          {% else %}
20	            {{- site.title -}}
21	          {% endif %}
22	        </a>
23	      {% elsif site.enable_navbar_social %}

25	        <div class="navbar-brand social">{% include social.liquid %}</div>
26	      {% endif %}
27	      <!-- Navbar Toggle -->
28	      <button
29	        class="navbar-toggler collapsed ml-auto"
30	        type="button"
31	        data-toggle="collapse"
32	        data-target="#navbarNav"
33	        aria-controls="navbarNav"
34	        aria-expanded="false"
35	        aria-label="Toggle navigation"
36	      >
37	        <span class="sr-only">Toggle navigation</span>
38	        <span class="icon-bar top-bar"></span>
39	        <span class="icon-bar middle-bar"></span>
40	        <span class="icon-bar bottom-bar"></span>
41	      </button>
42	
43	      <div class="collapse navbar-collapse text-right" id="navbarNav">
44	        <ul class="navbar-nav ml-auto flex-nowrap">
45	          {% for page in site.pages %}
46	            {% if page.permalink == '/' %} {% assign about_title = page.title %} {% endif %}
47	          {% endfor %}
48	
49	          <!-- About -->
50	          <li class="nav-item {% if page.permalink == '/' %}active{% endif %}">
51	            <a class="nav-link" href="{{ '/' | relative_url }}">
52	              {{- about_title }}
53	              {% if page.permalink == '/' %}
54	                <span class="sr-only">(current)</span>
55	              {% endif %}
56	            </a>
57	          </li>
58	
59	          <!-- Other pages -->
60	          {% assign sorted_pages = site.pages | sort: 'nav_order' %}
61	          {% for p in sorted_pages %}
62	            {% if p.nav and p.autogen == null %}
63	              {% if p.dropdown %}
64	                {% assign has_active_child = false %}
65	                {% for child in p.children %}
66	                  {% if page.title == child.title %}
67	                    {% assign has_active_child = true %}
68	                  {% endif %}
69	                {% endfor %}
70	                <li class="nav-item dropdown {% if page.title == p.title or has_active_child %}active{% endif %}">
71	                  <a
72	                    class="nav-link dropdown-toggle"
73	                    href="#"
74	                    id="navbarDropdown"
75	                    role="button"
76	                    data-toggle="dropdown"
77	                    aria-haspopup="true"
78	                    aria-expanded="false"
79	                  >
80	                    {{- p.title }}
81	                    {% if page.title == p.title or has_active_child %}
82	                      <span class="sr-only">(current)</span>
83	                    {% endif %}
84	                  </a>
85	                  <div class="dropdown-menu dropdown-menu-right" aria-labelledby="navbarDropdown">
86	                    {% for child in p.children %}
87	                      {% if child.title == 'divider' %}
88	                        <div class="dropdown-divider"></div>
89	                      {% else %}
90	                        <a
91	                          class="dropdown-item {% if page.title == child.title %}active{% endif %}"
92	                          href="{% if child.permalink contains '://' %}{{ child.permalink }}{% else %}{{ child.permalink | relative_url }}{% endif %}"
93	                        >
94	                          {{- child.title -}}
95	                        </a>
96	                      {% endif %}
97	                    {% endfor %}
98	                  </div>
99	                </li>
100	              {% else %}
101	                {% assign parent_link = p.permalink | remove: 'index.html' %}
102	                <li class="nav-item {% if page.url contains parent_link %}active{% endif %}">
103	                  {%- if p.permalink contains '://' -%}
104	                    {%- assign url = p.permalink -%}
105	                  {%- elsif p.permalink contains '/blog/' -%}
106	                    {%- assign url = '/blog/' -%}
107	                  {%- else -%}
108	                    {%- assign url = p.url -%}
109	                  {%- endif %}
110	                  <a class="nav-link" href="{{ url | relative_url }}">
111	                    {{- p.title }}
112	                    {% if page.url contains p.url %}
113	                      <span class="sr-only">(current)</span>
114	                    {% endif %}
115	                  </a>
116	                </li>
117	              {% endif %}
118	            {% endif %}
119	          {% endfor %}
120	          {% if site.search_enabled %}
121	            <!-- Search -->
122	            <li class="nav-item">
123	              <button id="search-toggle" title="Search" onclick="openSearchModal()">
124	                <span class="nav-link">ctrl k <i class="ti ti-search"></i></span>
125	              </button>
126	            </li>
127	          {% endif %}
128	          {% if site.enable_darkmode %}
129	            <!-- Toogle theme mode -->
130	            <li class="toggle-container">
131	              <button id="light-toggle" title="Change theme">
132	                <i class="ti ti-sun-moon" id="light-toggle-system"></i>
133	                <i class="ti ti-moon-filled" id="light-toggle-dark"></i>
134	                <i class="ti ti-sun-filled" id="light-toggle-light"></i>
135	              </button>
136	            </li>
137	          {% endif %}
138	        </ul>
139	      </div>
140	    </div>
141	  </nav>
142	  {% if site.enable_progressbar %}

144	    <progress id="progress" value="0">
145	      <div class="progress-container">
146	        <span class="progress-bar"></span>
147	      </div>
148	    </progress>
149	  {% endif %}
150	</header>
```

```text
1	---
2	layout: about
3	title: About
4	permalink: /
5	subtitle: <span class="highlight-text"> Ph.D. student </span>at The University of Wisconsin-Madison CEE
6	
7	
8	profile:
9	  align: right
10	  image: DSCF1344.webp
11	  image_circular: false # crops the image to make it circular
12	  more_info: >
13	    <p style="margin-left: 35px;">Chicago, US, 2025</p>
14	
15	news: true # includes a list of news items
16	selected_papers: true # includes a list of papers marked as "selected={true}"
17	social: true # includes social icons at the bottom of the page
18	---
19	Hello there!🤺
20	
21	I am a first-year **Ph.D. student** in the Department of Civil and Environmental Engineering at the <img src="../assets/img/uwmadison.png" width="14" height="22" style="vertical-align: middle; margin: 0 2px;"/>[University of Wisconsin-Madison](https://www.wisc.edu/) (UW-Madison). I joined <img src="../assets/img/skylab.png" width="33" height="22" style="vertical-align: middle; margin: 0 2px;"/>[Sky-Lab](https://sky-lab-uw.github.io/) at UW-Madison in Fall 2025 under the guidance of Dr.[Sikai (Sky) Chen](https://sky-lab-uw.github.io/people/). On Wisconsin!<img src="../assets/img/bucky.png" width="15" height="22" style="vertical-align: middle; margin: 0 2px;"/>
22	
23	Before joining UW-Madison, I obtained my M.S. in Transportation Engineering at [College of Transportation](https://tjjt.tongji.edu.cn/), <img src="../assets/img/tongji.png" width="22" height="22" style="vertical-align: middle; margin: 0 2px;"/>Tongji University in 2025, and my B.E. in Vehicle Engineering at [Institute of Rail Transit](https://railway.tongji.edu.cn/main.htm), Tongji University in 2022. I am very fortunate and honored to be advised by Prof. [Hechao Zhou](https://tjjt.tongji.edu.cn/info/2943/10933.htm) and Prof. [Jimin Zhang](https://railway.tongji.edu.cn/c5/e6/c4609a50662/page.htm) during my study at Tongji University. 🫶
24	
25	As for now, I am working to accelerate the development of future intelligent transportation technologies. 🧐 Specifically, I focus on:
26	
27	- **Autonomous driving**
28	- **Vision-Language-Action model**
29	- **Intelligent transportation systems**
30	
31	An equally important dimension of my work is to validate autonomous driving related methods through **real‑vehicle testing**: I have contributed to the development of <img src="../assets/img/Sky-Drive.png" width="25" height="25" style="vertical-align: middle; margin: 0 2px;"/>[SkyDrive](https://github.com/BillWan-zzzyyy/Sky-Drive), an open source multi-agent platform for future transportation system and autonomous driving by Sky-Lab.
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>

 `./\_layouts\bib.liquid`

```text
1	---
2	---
3	<div class="row">
4	  {% if site.enable_publication_thumbnails %}
5	    <div class="col col-sm-3 abbr">
6	      {%- if entry.abbr -%}
7	        {% assign badge_color = nil %}
8	        {% if entry.priority == "0" %}
9	          {% assign badge_color = "#B8508A" %}
10	        {% elsif entry.priority == "1" %}
11	          {% assign badge_color = "#96682A" %}
12	        {% elsif entry.priority == "2" %}
13	          {% assign badge_color = "#4A708A" %}
14	        {% elsif entry.priority == "3" %}
15	          {% assign badge_color = "#8C7050" %}
16	        {% elsif site.data.venues[entry.abbr].color != blank %}
17	          {% assign badge_color = site.data.venues[entry.abbr].color %}
18	        {% endif %}
19	        <abbr
20	          class="badge rounded w-100"
21	          {% if badge_color %}style="background-color:{{ badge_color }}; color: white"{% else %}style="color: white"{% endif %}
22	        >
23	          {% if site.data.venues[entry.abbr].url %}
24	            <a href="{{ site.data.venues[entry.abbr].url }}" style="color: white">{{ entry.abbr }}</a>
25	          {% else %}
26	            <div style="color: white">{{- entry.abbr -}}</div>
27	          {% endif %}
28	        </abbr>
29	      {% endif %}
30	      {% if entry.preview %}
31	        {% if entry.preview contains '://' %}
32	          <img class="preview z-depth-1 rounded" src="{{ entry.preview }}">
33	        {% else %}
34	          {% assign entry_path = entry.preview | prepend: '/assets/img/publication_preview/' %}
35	          {%
36	            include figure.liquid
37	            loading="eager"
38	            path=entry_path
39	            sizes = "280px"
40	            class="preview z-depth-1 rounded"
41	            zoomable=true
42	            alt=entry.preview
43	          %}
44	        {% endif %}
45	      {% endif %}
46	    </div>
47	  {% endif %}
48	
49	  <!-- Entry bib key -->
50	  <div id="{{ entry.key }}" class="{% if site.enable_publication_thumbnails %}col-sm-8{% else %}col-sm-10{% endif %}">
51	    <!-- Title -->
52	    <div class="title">{{ entry.title }}</div>
53	    <!-- Author -->
54	    <div class="author">
55	      {% assign author_array_size = entry.author_array | size %}
56	
57	      {% assign author_array_limit = author_array_size %}
58	      {% if site.max_author_limit and author_array_size > site.max_author_limit %}
59	        {% assign author_array_limit = site.max_author_limit %}
60	      {% endif %}
61	
62	      {%- for author in entry.author_array limit: author_array_limit -%}
63	        {% assign author_is_self = false %}
64	        {%- assign author_last_name = author.last | regex_replace: '[*∗†‡§¶‖&^]', '' -%}
65	        {%- assign author_last_html = author.last | regex_replace: '([*∗†‡§¶‖&^]+)', '<sup>\1</sup>' -%}
66	        {% if site.scholar.last_name contains author_last_name %}
67	          {% if site.scholar.first_name contains author.first %}
68	            {% assign author_is_self = true %}
69	          {% endif %}
70	        {%- endif -%}
71	        {% assign coauthor_url = null %}
72	        {%- assign clean_last_name = author_last_name | downcase | remove_accents -%}
73	        {% if site.data.coauthors[clean_last_name] %}
74	          {%- for coauthor in site.data.coauthors[clean_last_name] -%}
75	            {% if coauthor.firstname contains author.first %}
76	              {%- assign coauthor_url = coauthor.url -%}
77	              {% break %}
78	            {% endif %}
79	          {% endfor %}
80	        {%- endif -%}
81	
82	        {%- if forloop.length > 1 -%}
83	          {% if forloop.first == false %},&nbsp;{% endif %}
84	          {%- if forloop.last and author_array_limit == author_array_size %}and&nbsp;{% endif -%}
85	        {% endif %}
86	        {%- if author_is_self -%}
87	          <em>
88	            {{- author.first }}
89	            {{ author_last_html -}}
90	          </em>
91	        {%- else -%}
92	          {%- if coauthor_url -%}
93	            <a href="{{ coauthor_url }}">
94	              {{- author.first }}
95	              {{ author_last_html -}}
96	            </a>
97	          {%- else -%}
98	            {{- author.first }}
99	            {{ author_last_html -}}
100	          {% endif %}
101	        {%- endif -%}
102	      {% endfor %}
103	      {%- assign more_authors = author_array_size | minus: author_array_limit -%}
104	
105	      {%- assign more_authors_hide = more_authors | append: ' more author' -%}
106	      {% if more_authors > 0 %}
107	        {%- if more_authors > 1 -%}
108	          {% assign more_authors_hide = more_authors_hide | append: 's' %}
109	        {%- endif -%}
110	        {% assign more_authors_show = '' %}
111	        {%- for author in entry.author_array offset: author_array_limit -%}
112	          {% assign more_authors_show = more_authors_show | append: author.first | append: ' ' | append: author.last %}
113	          {% unless forloop.last %}
114	            {% assign more_authors_show = more_authors_show | append: ', ' %}
115	          {% endunless %}
116	        {%- endfor -%}
117	        {%- assign more_authors_show = more_authors_show | regex_replace: '([*∗†‡§¶‖&^]+)', '<sup>\1</sup>' -%}
118	        , and
119	        <span
120	          class="more-authors"
121	          title="click to view {{ more_authors_hide }}"
122	          onclick="
123	              var element = $(this);
124	              element.attr('title', '');
125	              var more_authors_text = element.text() == '{{ more_authors_hide }}' ? '{{ more_authors_show }}' : '{{ more_authors_hide }}';
126	              var cursorPosition = 0;
127	              var textAdder = setInterval(function(){
128	                element.html(more_authors_text.substring(0, cursorPosition + 1));
129	                if (++cursorPosition == more_authors_text.length){
130	                  clearInterval(textAdder);
131	                }
132	            }, '{{ site.more_authors_animation_delay }}');
133	          "
134	        >
135	          {{- more_authors_hide -}}
136	        </span>
137	      {% endif %}
138	      {% if entry.annotation %}
139	        <i
140	          class="fa-solid fa-circle-info ml-1"
141	          data-toggle="popover"
142	          data-placement="top"
143	          data-html="true"
144	          data-content="{{ entry.annotation | escape }}"
145	        >
146	        </i>
147	      {% endif %}
148	    </div>
149	
150	    <!-- Journal/Book title and date -->
151	    {% assign proceedings = 'inproceedings,incollection' | split: ',' %}
152	    {% assign thesis = 'thesis,mastersthesis,phdthesis' | split: ',' %}
153	    {% if entry.type == 'article' %}
154	      {% capture entrytype %}<em>{{ entry.journal }}</em>{% endcapture %}
155	    {% elsif proceedings contains entry.type %}
156	      {% capture entrytype %}<em>In {{ entry.booktitle }}</em>{% endcapture %}
157	    {% elsif thesis contains entry.type %}
158	      {% capture entrytype %}<em>{{ entry.school }}</em>{% endcapture %}
159	    {% else %}
160	      {% capture entrytype %}{% endcapture %}
161	    {% endif %}
162	    {% if entry.month %}
163	      {% capture entrymonth %}{{ " " }}{{ entry.month | capitalize }}{% endcapture %}
164	    {% endif %}
165	    {% if entry.year %}
166	      {% capture entryyear %}{{ " " }}{{ entry.year }}{% endcapture %}
167	    {% endif %}
168	    {% if entry.location %}
169	      {% capture entrytype %}{{ entrytype }}{{ ", " }}{{ entry.location }}{% endcapture %}
170	    {% endif -%}
171	    {% if entry.additional_info %}
172	      {% capture entrytype %}{{ entrytype }}{{ entry.additional_info | markdownify | remove: '<p>' | remove: '</p>' }}{% endcapture %}
173	    {% endif %}
174	    {% capture hook_exists %}{% file_exists _includes/hook/bib.liquid %}{% endcapture %}
175	    {% if hook_exists == 'true' %}
176	      {% include hook/bib.liquid %}
177	    {% endif %}
178	    {% assign entrytype_text = entrytype | strip_html | strip %}
179	    {% capture periodical %}{{ entrytype }}{% if entrytype_text != "" and entryyear != "" %}, {% endif %}{{ entrymonth }}{{ entryyear }}{% endcapture %}
180	    <div class="periodical">
181	      {{ periodical | strip }}
182	    </div>
183	    <div class="periodical">
184	      {{ entry.note | strip }}
185	    </div>
186	
187	    <!-- Links/Buttons -->
188	    <div class="links">
189	      {% if entry.award %}
190	        <a class="award btn btn-sm z-depth-0" role="button">
191	          {%- if entry.award_name %}{{ entry.award_name }}{% else %}Awarded{% endif -%}
192	        </a>
193	      {% endif %}
194	      {% if entry.abstract %}
195	        <a class="abstract btn btn-sm z-depth-0" role="button">Abs</a>
196	      {% endif %}
197	      {% if entry.doi %}
198	        <a href="https://doi.org/{{ entry.doi }}" class="btn btn-sm z-depth-0" role="button">DOI</a>
199	      {% endif %}
200	      {% if entry.html %}
201	        {% if entry.html contains '://' %}
202	          <a href="{{ entry.html }}" class="btn btn-sm z-depth-0" role="button">Paper</a>
203	        {% else %}
204	          <a href="{{ entry.html | prepend: '/assets/html/' | relative_url }}" class="btn btn-sm z-depth-0" role="button">Paper</a>
205	        {% endif %}
206	      {% elsif entry.arxiv %}
207	        <a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/{{ entry.arxiv }}" class="btn btn-sm z-depth-0" role="button">Paper</a>
208	      {% endif %}
209	      {% if entry.pdf %}
210	        {% if entry.pdf contains '://' %}
211	          <a href="{{ entry.pdf }}" class="btn btn-sm z-depth-0" role="button">PDF</a>
212	        {% else %}
213	          <a href="{{ entry.pdf | prepend: '/assets/pdf/' | relative_url }}" class="btn btn-sm z-depth-0" role="button">PDF</a>
214	        {% endif %}
215	      {% endif %}
216	      {% if entry.supp %}
217	        {% if entry.supp contains '://' %}
218	          <a href="{{ entry.supp }}" class="btn btn-sm z-depth-0" role="button">Supp</a>
219	        {% else %}

221	        {% endif %}
222	      {% endif %}
223	      {% if entry.blog %}
224	        <a href="{{ entry.blog }}" class="btn btn-sm z-depth-0" role="button">Blog</a>
225	      {% endif %}
226	      {% if entry.code %}
227	        <a href="{{ entry.code }}" class="btn btn-sm z-depth-0" role="button">Code</a>
228	      {% endif %}
229	      {% if entry.poster %}
230	        {% if entry.poster contains '://' %}
231	          <a href="{{ entry.poster }}" class="btn btn-sm z-depth-0" role="button">Poster</a>
232	        {% else %}
233	          <a href="{{ entry.poster | prepend: '/assets/pdf/' | relative_url }}" class="btn btn-sm z-depth-0" role="button">Poster</a>
234	        {% endif %}
235	      {% endif %}
236	      {% if entry.slides %}

241	        {% endif %}
242	      {% endif %}
243	      {% if entry.website %}
244	        <a href="{{ entry.website }}" class="btn btn-sm z-depth-0" role="button">Website</a>
245	      {% endif %}
246	    </div>
247	    {% if site.enable_publication_badges %}
248	      {% assign entry_has_altmetric_badge = false %}
249	      {% if entry.altmetric and entry.altmetric != 'false' %}
250	        {% assign entry_has_altmetric_badge = true %}
251	      {% endif %}
252	
253	      {% assign entry_has_dimensions_badge = false %}
254	      {% if entry.dimensions and entry.dimensions != 'false' %}
255	        {% assign entry_has_dimensions_badge = true %}
256	      {% endif %}
257	
258	      {% assign entry_has_google_scholar_badge = false %}
259	      {% if entry.google_scholar_id %}
260	        {% assign entry_has_google_scholar_badge = true %}
261	      {% endif %}
262	
263	      {% assign entry_has_github_stars_badge = false %}
264	      {% if entry.github_repo %}
265	        {% assign entry_has_github_stars_badge = true %}
266	      {% endif %}
267	
268	      {% assign entry_has_inspirehep_badge = false %}
269	      {% if entry.inspirehep_id %}
270	        {% assign entry_has_inspirehep_badge = true %}
271	      {% endif %}
272	      {% if entry_has_altmetric_badge or entry_has_dimensions_badge or entry_has_google_scholar_badge or entry_has_github_stars_badge or entry_has_inspirehep_badge %}
273	        <div class="badges">
274	          {% if site.enable_publication_badges.altmetric and entry_has_altmetric_badge %}
275	            <span
276	              class="altmetric-embed"
277	              data-badge-type="2"
278	              data-badge-popover="right"
279	              {% if entry.altmetric != blank and entry.altmetric != 'true' %}
280	                data-altmetric-id="{{ entry.altmetric }}"
281	              {% elsif entry.arxiv %}
282	                data-arxiv-id="{{ entry.arxiv }}"
283	              {% elsif entry.eprint %}
284	                data-arxiv-id="{{ entry.eprint }}"
285	              {% elsif entry.doi %}
286	                data-doi="{{ entry.doi }}"
287	              {% elsif entry.pmid %}
288	                data-pmid="{{ entry.pmid }}"
289	              {% elsif entry.isbn %}
290	                data-isbn="{{ entry.isbn }}"
291	              {% endif %}
292	            ></span>
293	          {% endif %}
294	          {% if site.enable_publication_badges.dimensions and entry_has_dimensions_badge %}
295	            <span
296	              class="__dimensions_badge_embed__"
297	              {% if entry.dimensions != blank and entry.dimensions != 'true' %}
298	                data-id="{{ entry.dimensions }}"
299	              {% elsif entry.doi %}
300	                data-doi="{{ entry.doi }}"
301	              {% else %}
302	                data-pmid="{{ entry.pmid }}"
303	              {% endif %}
304	              data-style="small_rectangle"
305	              data-legend="hover-right"
306	              style="margin-bottom: 3px;"
307	            ></span>
308	          {% endif %}
309	          {% if site.enable_publication_badges.google_scholar and entry_has_google_scholar_badge %}
310	            {% assign gs_count = site.data.scholar_citations.articles[entry.google_scholar_id] | default: 0 %}
311	            <a
312	              href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?view_op=view_citation&hl=en&user={{ site.scholar_userid }}&citation_for_view={{ site.scholar_userid }}:{{ entry.google_scholar_id }}"
313	              aria-label="Google Scholar link"
314	              role="button"
315	              style="display: inline-flex; align-items: stretch; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 4px; overflow: hidden; vertical-align: middle;"
316	            >
317	              <span style="display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.25rem; padding: 0.15rem 0.4rem; background: #f5f0e6; color: #4285F4; font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1;">
318	                <i class="ai ai-google-scholar" style="font-size: 0.8rem;"></i> Scholar
319	              </span>
320	              <span style="display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 0.15rem 0.4rem; background: #4285F4; color: #fff; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1;">
321	                {{ gs_count }}
322	              </span>
323	            </a>
324	          {% endif %}
325	          {% if site.enable_publication_badges.github_stars and entry_has_github_stars_badge %}
326	            {% assign star_count = site.data.github_stars.repos[entry.github_repo] | default: 0 %}
327	            <a
328	              href="https://github.com/{{ entry.github_repo }}"
329	              aria-label="GitHub repository"
330	              role="button"
331	              style="display: inline-flex; align-items: stretch; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 4px; overflow: hidden; vertical-align: middle;"
332	            >
333	              <span style="display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.25rem; padding: 0.15rem 0.4rem; background: #f5f0e6; color: #181717; font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1;">
334	                <i class="fa-brands fa-github" style="font-size: 0.8rem; color: #181717;"></i> Github
335	              </span>
336	              <span style="display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 0.15rem 0.4rem; background: #181717; color: #fff; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1;">
337	                {{ star_count }} ★
338	              </span>
339	            </a>
340	          {% endif %}
341	          {% if site.enable_publication_badges.inspirehep and entry_has_inspirehep_badge %}
342	            <a
343	              href="https://inspirehep.net/literature/{{ entry.inspirehep_id }}"
344	              aria-label="Inspirehep link"
345	              role="button"
346	            >

348	                src="https://img.shields.io/badge/inspire-{% inspirehep_citations entry.inspirehep_id %}-001628?logo=inspire&logoColor=001628&labelColor=beige"
349	                alt="{% inspirehep_citations entry.inspirehep_id %} InspireHEP citations"
350	              >
351	            </a>
352	          {% endif %}
353	        </div>
354	      {% endif %}
355	    {% endif %}
356	
357	    {% if entry.award %}
358	      <!-- Hidden Award block -->
359	      <div class="award hidden d-print-inline">
360	        <p>{{ entry.award | markdownify }}</p>
361	      </div>
362	    {% endif %}
363	
364	    {% if entry.abstract %}
365	      <!-- Hidden abstract block -->
366	      <div class="abstract hidden">
367	        <p>{{ entry.abstract }}</p>
368	      </div>
369	    {% endif %}
370	
371	    {% if entry.bibtex_show %}

379	
380	    {% if entry.video and site.enable_video_embedding %}

383	        <div style="text-align: center;">{% include video.liquid path=entry.video class="img-fluid rounded z-depth-1" controls=true %}</div>
384	      </div>
385	    {% endif %}
386	  </div>
387	</div>
388
```

# Visual Redesign Plan — Zhengyang Wan al-folio Site

## 1. Context & Goal

Zhengyang's al-folio Jekyll site already has the right fonts loaded (Source Serif 4, Inter, JetBrains Mono) and a UW-red theme, but pages are rendered in the default al-folio boxed-card style with mixed-metaphor typography (serif body + Inter H1s + Bootstrap cards). The goal is to rebuild the visual layer toward an **Academic Editorial** base (Nature/Distill/Stripe) with **Modern Tech** accents (mono metadata, ⌘K, hairline dark mode), by replacing `_sass/*.scss` tokens + overhauling six templates. The Jekyll/jekyll-scholar pipeline, Bootstrap 4.6, MDB, and all plugins stay untouched. Scope: About, Publications, CV, Projects, News; one engineer / one sitting.

## 2. Design System Spec

**New file `_sass/_tokens.scss`** (imported in `assets/css/main.scss` between `variables` and `themes`):

**Colors — red 9-step (UW-Madison brand):**
`$red-50:#fff5f5; $red-100:#ffe5e5; $red-200:#fbc2c2; $red-300:#f28e8e; $red-400:#e25a5a; $red-500:#c5050c; $red-600:#a10309; $red-700:#7d0207; $red-800:#5c0105; $red-900:#3d0003`
Canonical accent = `$red-500 = #c5050c`. Replace `#c5051c` in `_sass/_layout.scss:42` with it.

**Neutrals — light:**
`$n-0:#ffffff; $n-50:#fafafa; $n-100:#f3f4f6; $n-200:#e5e7eb; $n-300:#d1d5db; $n-400:#9ca3af; $n-500:#6b7280; $n-600:#4b5563; $n-700:#374151; $n-800:#1f2937; $n-900:#111827`

**Neutrals — dark (cool ink):**
`$ink-0:#0f1216; $ink-50:#151820; $ink-100:#1a1e26; $ink-200:#262b36; $ink-300:#363c48; $ink-400:#5b6271; $ink-500:#8a92a1; $ink-600:#adb4c0; $ink-700:#c9ced7; $ink-800:#dde0e6; $ink-900:#e8eaed`
Dark bg = `#0f1216`, text = `#e8eaed`. Contrast = 15.8:1, WCAG AAA.

**Type scale (rem, Source Serif 4 display, Inter UI, JetBrains Mono meta):**
- `$fs-xs:0.75rem` / 1.4 (mono eyebrow, pill labels)
- `$fs-sm:0.875rem` / 1.5 (mono meta, news date)
- `$fs-base:1rem` / 1.65 (body)
- `$fs-md:1.125rem` / 1.55 (bib title)
- `$fs-lg:1.375rem` / 1.35 (h3 section)
- `$fs-xl:1.75rem` / 1.25 (h2)
- `$fs-2xl:2.5rem` / 1.1 (h1 hero name)
- `$fs-3xl:3.25rem` / 1.05 (display, optional)

**Spacing scale:** `$sp-1:4px; $sp-2:8px; $sp-3:12px; $sp-4:16px; $sp-5:24px; $sp-6:32px; $sp-7:48px; $sp-8:64px; $sp-9:96px`

**Radius:** `$r-sm:2px; $r-md:4px; $r-lg:6px; $r-pill:999px` (hairline-editorial: prefer `$r-sm`/`$r-md`; no large rounds on cards).

**Shadow:** `$sh-none:none; $sh-1:0 1px 0 var(--hairline); $sh-2:0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.06); $sh-hover:0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.08)`. Cards use `$sh-none` + hairline border; only buttons/images use `$sh-hover` on interact.

**Motion:** `$dur-fast:120ms; $dur-base:150ms; $dur-slow:240ms; $ease-out:cubic-bezier(0.2,0,0,1)`. Applied to links (color+underline), buttons (bg+border), and image hovers only. Cards do not lift.

**Hairline utility:** `--hairline: rgba(0,0,0,.08)` light, `#262b36` dark. Use for all dividers replacing `.dashed-divider` and card borders.

## 3. Page-by-Page Changes

### 3.1 Typography + Sass overhaul (`_sass/_base.scss`, `_sass/_layout.scss`)

- `_base.scss:7-17` — keep family declarations. Body `line-height: 1.65`.
- `_base.scss:38-57` — **delete** the ornamental `h6::after` red underline (incompatible with editorial; replace with simple `h6 { font-family:Inter; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.08em; font-size:$fs-sm; color:var(--global-text-color-light); }` + a separate `.section-rule { border-bottom:1px solid var(--hairline); margin:$sp-5 0 $sp-4; }`).
- Spell h1–h6 sizes in rem per the type scale above. `h1 { font-family:'Source Serif 4'; font-weight:600; font-size:$fs-2xl; }` — switch H1/H2 display to serif; keep H4–H6 on Inter for UI feel.
- `_layout.scss:41-44` — fix `#c5051c` → `$red-500`; keep `.highlight-text` semantic.
- Delete TODO comments at `_layout.scss:46,52,58` and replace with structured sections.
- Remove `.dashed-divider` dashed style site-wide; replace with solid 1px hairline.

**Acceptance:** Body text reads in Source Serif 4 everywhere; H1 hero name is serif; H6 section labels are Inter small-caps with a hairline rule; no single hex hex in theme files except in `_tokens.scss`.

### 3.2 `_sass/_themes.scss` (consume tokens)

- Replace every `$red-colorcus`, `$grey-*`, `$black-color` reference with token vars.
- Add vars: `--hairline`, `--mono-meta`, `--link-underline`, `--card-border`, `--bg-subtle`, `--btn-outline`.
- Dark mode: bg `$ink-0`, text `$ink-900`, card `$ink-50`, hairline `$ink-200`. 1. **CV data (BLOCKING):** `_data/cv.yml` is still Einstein placeholder (`_data/cv.yml:5` "Albert Einstein"). User must supply real education/experience/awards/skills entries before CV page goes live. Proposed block should be committed in a separate PR alongside this visual overhaul.

3. **Progress bar:** recommend 2px red line. Alternative: remove (`_config.yml` already has `enable_progressbar` flag to disable). Default: **keep, 2px red**.
4. **Dark-mode accent color:** al-folio flips to cyan in dark; requirement says red stays. Verified `$red-500` on `$ink-0` = 5.1:1 AA. **Override the cyan default** in `_themes.scss:85-86`.
5. **Contact note:** `_config.yml:114` `contact_note` empty — if user wants one (e.g., "Best way to reach me: email"), add a line before the social icons on the homepage.

```md
# Academic Editorial Redesign — Zhengyang Wan's al-folio Site

## Context

Current al-folio site already loads the right font stack (Source Serif 4 / Inter / JetBrains Mono at `_base.scss:7-17`) and carries a UW-red accent, but pages still render in stock al-folio boxed-card style with mixed-metaphor type (serif body + Inter H1 + Bootstrap/MDB cards). User wants a visual-only overhaul that preserves site IA (title-left + avatar-right hero, UW red as brand), shifts the aesthetic to **Academic Editorial** (Nature / Distill / Stripe — serif display, generous whitespace, hairline rules instead of card boxes, red used only for links & author highlight) with **Modern Tech accents** (mono metadata pills, hairline dark mode on cool ink instead of pure black, subtle micro-interactions). Jekyll / jekyll-scholar / Bootstrap pipeline stays untouched. In-scope: About, Publications, CV, Projects, News. Out of scope: Repositories, Teaching (user confirmed not displayed).

## Design System (new `_sass/_tokens.scss`)

Import in `assets/css/main.scss` **before** `_themes.scss`. Every hex lives here; `_themes.scss` consumes tokens via CSS variables.

**Red scale (UW brand):** `$red-50:#fff5f5; $red-100:#ffe5e5; $red-200:#fbc2c2; $red-300:#f28e8e; $red-400:#e25a5a; $red-500:#c5050c; $red-600:#a10309; $red-700:#7d0207; $red-800:#5c0105; $red-900:#3d0003`. Accent = `$red-500`. Fix `_sass/_layout.scss:42` typo `#c5051c` → `$red-500`.

**Neutrals (light):** `#ffffff → #111827` (Tailwind-style 9-step).
**Neutrals (dark ink):** `$ink-0:#0f1216; $ink-50:#151820; $ink-100:#1a1e26; $ink-200:#262b36; …; $ink-900:#e8eaed`. Body on bg = 15.8:1 (AAA). `$red-500` on `$ink-0` = 5.1:1 (AA) — red stays the accent in dark mode (override al-folio's cyan default at `_themes.scss:85-86`).

**Type scale (rem):** `$fs-xs .75/1.4 · $fs-sm .875/1.5 · $fs-base 1/1.65 · $fs-md 1.125/1.55 · $fs-lg 1.375/1.35 · $fs-xl 1.75/1.25 · $fs-2xl 2.5/1.1`. Display & body = Source Serif 4; UI/labels = Inter; metadata/year/⭐ = JetBrains Mono.

**Spacing:** `4 · 8 · 12 · 16 · 24 · 32 · 48 · 64 · 96` px.
**Radius:** `2 / 4 / 6 / 999` (editorial favors `2–4`; no large rounds on cards).
**Shadow:** `none / hairline / soft (1px 2px rgba 0,0,0,.06) / hover (4px 12px rgba 0,0,0,.08)`. Cards do **not** lift; only buttons & images do.
**Motion:** `120/150/240 ms` × `cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1)`. Applied to links, buttons, hovers; never to layout shifts.
**Hairline:** `--hairline: rgba(0,0,0,.08)` light / `$ink-200` dark. Replaces all `.dashed-divider`.

## Page-by-Page Changes

### A. Homepage — `_layouts/about.liquid` + `_pages/about.md`

- `about.liquid:6-13` H1: switch to Source Serif 4 `$fs-2xl` weight 600. Add above it a mono eyebrow `<p class="eyebrow">PHD CANDIDATE · CEE · UW–MADISON</p>` (Inter uppercase, `$fs-xs`, tracking .08em, muted).
- `about.liquid:14` subtitle: serif italic `$fs-lg`; keep `.highlight-text` (now `$red-500` after typo fix).
- `about.liquid:18-21` social row: monochrome 20px icons, hover → `$red-500` in `$dur-base`.
- `about.liquid:31` profile wrapper: add `.profile__card` — hairline border, 2px radius, no MDB `z-depth-1` shadow.
- `about.liquid:53` bio: wrap in `.bio { max-width: 64ch; line-height: 1.7 }`.
- `about.md:21,23,31` inline logos: replace ad-hoc width/height inline styles with `class="inline-logo"` (rule: `height:1em; vertical-align:-0.15em; margin:0 .15em`). Normalizes the 6 logos to matching visual weight.
- Insert below bio: mono **meta strip** `<ul class="meta-strip">PhD @ UW–Madison · CEE · Chicago, US · 2025—</ul>` (flex row, `::after` bullet separators).
- `about.liquid:55-64` news block: keep `<h6>` heading, delegate to rewritten `news.liquid`.
- `about.liquid:79-88` selected-pubs: same wrapper; reuses rewritten bib card.

### B. Navbar + Footer — `_includes/header.liquid`, `_includes/footer.liquid`

- `header.liquid:3`: remove Bootstrap shadow, add `border-bottom: 1px solid var(--hairline)`.
- Active nav link: `::after` 2px `$red-500` underline, full width, `bottom: -1px`.
- `header.liquid:120-127` ⌘K button: label in JetBrains Mono inside a hairline pill (`$r-md`, `$sp-1 $sp-2`).

### C. Publications — `_layouts/bib.liquid` (388 lines) + `_pages/publications.md`

- `_config.yml` scholar block: add `group_by: year` + `group_order: descending`. jekyll-scholar emits `<h2 class="bibliography">YEAR</h2>` automatically — style as **sticky left-gutter** on desktop: `position:sticky; top:$sp-7; font-family: JetBrains Mono; font-size:$fs-sm; color:$n-500`. Mobile falls back to inline header.

- `bib.liquid:50`: swap `.col-sm-*` for 3-zone flex: `[title + authors + venue] [spacer] [badges/stats]`.
- `bib.liquid:52` title: Source Serif 4, `$fs-md`, weight 600.
- `bib.liquid:86-90` author-self highlight: change `<em>` wrapper to `<strong class="author-self">`; style `color:$red-500; font-weight:700` (drops italics; Wan's name now bold-red and readable).
- `bib.liquid:150-182` venue/periodical: wrap as `<span class="venue-pill">` — JetBrains Mono `$fs-xs`, hairline outline, `$r-md`, `$sp-1 $sp-2`. Year suppressed here (moved to year header).
- `bib.liquid:187-246` link buttons: global restyle via `.publications .btn-sm` — hairline 1px outline, no filled bg, Inter uppercase `$fs-xs`; hover → `$red-500` border+text.

- `bib.liquid:364-378` abstract / bibtex hidden blocks: wrap as `.expand-panel` with `grid-template-rows: 0fr → 1fr` transition. JS toggle already present; just ensure it flips `.open` class.
- If `entry.selected`, prepend `<span class="selected-dot">` (6px `$red-500` circle) to the row.
- `_pages/publications.md:12-33` inline-styled stat pills → `.stat-pill` class in `_base.scss`.

### D. News — `_includes/news.liquid` + `_pages/news.md`

Full rewrite of `news.liquid`:
- Replace `<table>` at line 10 with `<ol class="news-list">`.
- Each row: `<li class="news-row"><time class="news-date">{{ item.date | date:"%b %d, %Y" }}</time><div class="news-body">…</div></li>`.
- `.news-row`: `display:grid; grid-template-columns: 8ch 1fr; gap:$sp-4; padding:$sp-3 0; border-bottom:1px solid var(--hairline)`.
- `.news-date`: JetBrains Mono, `$fs-sm`, `$n-500`, nowrap.
- `.news-body`: Source Serif 4 `$fs-base`, `.news-title` = red link.
- `_pages/news.md` archive: wrap loop with `{% assign by_year = site.news | group_by_exp:"n","n.date | date:'%Y'" %}` (only when no `limit`), emitting a year header per group. Homepage path (`limit=true`) stays ungrouped.

### E. CV — `_layouts/cv.liquid` + `_includes/cv/time_table.liquid` + `_sass/_cv.scss`

- `cv.liquid:6-18` header: move PDF link into top-right as `<a class="btn-outline-red">Download CV (PDF)</a>` (1px `$red-500` border, red text, hover fills).
- `_includes/cv/time_table.liquid`: restyle to `grid-template-columns: 6ch 1fr` — year in JetBrains Mono left, institution/role + bullets right.
- `_sass/_cv.scss`: add `.cv-section__title`, `.cv-timeline`, `.cv-year`, `.cv-entry`; bullets use `· ` mono leader instead of disc.

### F. Projects — `_includes/projects.liquid` + `_includes/projects_horizontal.liquid` + `_pages/projects.md`

- Card: hairline 1px border + `$r-md`, no MDB shadow; hover → `$sh-hover` + border fades to `$red-500`.
- Title: Source Serif 4, `$fs-md`, 600. Description: serif `$fs-base`, 2-line clamp.
```
