- `about.liquid:79-88` selected-pubs: same wrapper; reuses rewritten bib card.
- `about.liquid:92-100` ClusterMaps: **relocate to `_includes/footer.liquid` at 40% opacity** (decision locked; see Blockers for alternate).
- Swap all three `<hr class="dashed-divider">` (lines 56, 80, 93) for `.section-rule` (solid 1px hairline, `margin: $sp-5 0 $sp-4`).

### B. Navbar + Footer — `_includes/header.liquid`, `_includes/footer.liquid`

- `header.liquid:3`: remove Bootstrap shadow, add `border-bottom: 1px solid var(--hairline)`.
- Active nav link: `::after` 2px `$red-500` underline, full width, `bottom: -1px`.
- `header.liquid:120-127` ⌘K button: label in JetBrains Mono inside a hairline pill (`$r-md`, `$sp-1 $sp-2`).
- `header.liquid:142-149` progress bar: 2px height, color `$red-500`.
- Footer: replace al-folio credit with `<p class="mono-meta">© 2026 Zhengyang Wan · Updated {{ site.time | date:"%Y-%m-%d" }}</p>` + `.footer__ornament` (ClusterMaps at opacity .4).

### C. Publications — `_layouts/bib.liquid` (388 lines) + `_pages/publications.md`

- `_config.yml` scholar block: add `group_by: year` + `group_order: descending`. jekyll-scholar emits `<h2 class="bibliography">YEAR</h2>` automatically — style as **sticky left-gutter** on desktop: `position:sticky; top:$sp-7; font-family: JetBrains Mono; font-size:$fs-sm; color:$n-500`. Mobile falls back to inline header.
- `bib.liquid:4-47` thumbnail: shrink to 80×60, hairline border, radius `$r-sm`.
- `bib.liquid:50`: swap `.col-sm-*` for 3-zone flex: `[title + authors + venue] [spacer] [badges/stats]`.
- `bib.liquid:52` title: Source Serif 4, `$fs-md`, weight 600.
- `bib.liquid:86-90` author-self highlight: change `<em>` wrapper to `<strong class="author-self">`; style `color:$red-500; font-weight:700` (drops italics; Wan's name now bold-red and readable).
- `bib.liquid:150-182` venue/periodical: wrap as `<span class="venue-pill">` — JetBrains Mono `$fs-xs`, hairline outline, `$r-md`, `$sp-1 $sp-2`. Year suppressed here (moved to year header).
- `bib.liquid:187-246` link buttons: global restyle via `.publications .btn-sm` — hairline 1px outline, no filled bg, Inter uppercase `$fs-xs`; hover → `$red-500` border+text.
- `bib.liquid:272-354` Scholar / Altmetric / Dimensions / GitHub badges: harmonize to JetBrains Mono `$fs-xs`, replace beige `#f5f0e6` with `var(--bg-subtle)`; right-align in flex row.
- `bib.liquid:364-378` abstract / bibtex hidden blocks: wrap as `.expand-panel` with `grid-template-rows: 0fr → 1fr` transition. JS toggle already present; just ensure it flips `.open` class.
- If `entry.selected`, prepend `<span class="selected-dot">` (6px `$red-500` circle) to the row.
- `_pages/publications.md:12-33` inline-styled stat pills → `.stat-pill` class in `_base.scss`.

### D. News — `_includes/news.liquid` + `_pages/news.md`

Full rewrite of `news.liquid`:
- Replace `<table>` at line 10 with `<ol class="news-list">`.
- Each row: `<li class="news-row"><time class="news-date">{{ item.date | date:"%b %d, %Y" }}</time><div class="news-body">…</div></li>`.
- `.news-row`: `display:grid; grid-template-columns: 8ch 1fr; gap:$sp-4; padding:$sp-3 0; border-bottom:1px solid var(--hairline)`.
- `.news-date`: JetBrains Mono, `$fs-sm`, `$n-500`, nowrap.
- `.news-body`: Source Serif 4 `$fs-base`, `.news-title` = red link.
- `_pages/news.md` archive: wrap loop with `{% assign by_year = site.news | group_by_exp:"n","n.date | date:'%Y'" %}` (only when no `limit`), emitting a year header per group. Homepage path (`limit=true`) stays ungrouped.

### E. CV — `_layouts/cv.liquid` + `_includes/cv/time_table.liquid` + `_sass/_cv.scss`

**⚠ BLOCKED on real CV data.** `_data/cv.yml` currently contains Albert Einstein placeholder. Template overhaul can land in parallel, but the CV page itself should not go live until user supplies real education / experience / awards / skills entries. Add a TODO commit noting this.

- `cv.liquid:6-18` header: move PDF link into top-right as `<a class="btn-outline-red">Download CV (PDF)</a>` (1px `$red-500` border, red text, hover fills).
- `_includes/cv/time_table.liquid`: restyle to `grid-template-columns: 6ch 1fr` — year in JetBrains Mono left, institution/role + bullets right.
- `_sass/_cv.scss`: add `.cv-section__title`, `.cv-timeline`, `.cv-year`, `.cv-entry`; bullets use `· ` mono leader instead of disc.

### F. Projects — `_includes/projects.liquid` + `_includes/projects_horizontal.liquid` + `_pages/projects.md`

- Card: hairline 1px border + `$r-md`, no MDB shadow; hover → `$sh-hover` + border fades to `$red-500`.
- Title: Source Serif 4, `$fs-md`, 600. Description: serif `$fs-base`, 2-line clamp.
- Tech-stack pills from `_projects/*.md` front-matter `tags:` — mono pills.
- GitHub star count: JetBrains Mono `$fs-xs`, right-aligned card footer.
- `_pages/projects.md:16-18`: replace `<h2 class="category">` with top chip-row `<nav class="filter-chips">All · UW-Madison · Tongji</nav>` (anchor scroll, no JS needed).

15	code, pre, kbd, samp, tt {
16	  font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', monospace;
17	}
18	
19	p,
20	h1,
21	h2,
22	h3,
23	h4,
24	h5,
25	h6,
26	em,
27	div,
28	li,
29	span,
30	strong {
31	  color: var(--global-text-color);
32	}
33	
34	h2 {
35	  font-weight: 600;
36	}
37	
38	h6 {
39	  font-size: 1.5rem;
40	  font-weight: 600;
41	  display: inline-block; /* 让 h2 的宽度贴合内容，下划线长度会以此为基准 */
42	  position: relative;    /* 关键：为伪元素的绝对定位提供一个锚点 */
43	  padding-bottom: 8px;   /* 可选：为下划线留出足够的空间，避免重叠 */
44	}
45	
46	/* 创建并定义下划线本体 */
47	h6::after {
48	  content: '';         /* 伪元素必须有 content 属性 */
49	  position: absolute;
50	  bottom: 0;           /* 定位在 h2 元素的底部 */
51	  left: 0;             /* 从 h2 元素的左侧开始 */
52	
53	  /* --- 自定义部分 --- */
54	  width: 60px;             /* 1. 自定义长度：可以是百分比(如 50%)或固定值(如 80px) */
55	  height: 6px;             /* 2. 自定义粗细/宽度 */
56	  background-color: var(--global-theme-color);/* 3. 自定义颜色 */
57	}
58	
59	hr {
60	  border-top: 1px solid var(--global-divider-color);
61	}
62	
63	table {
64	  td,
65	  th {
66	    font-size: 1rem;
67	    padding: 1px 1rem 1px 0;
68	  }
69	
70	  th {
71	    font-weight: bold;
72	  }
73	}
74	
75	a,
76	table.table a {
77	  color: var(--global-theme-color);
78	
79	  &:hover {
80	    color: var(--global-theme-color);
81	    text-decoration: underline;
82	  }
83	
84	  &:hover:after :not(.nav-item.dropdown) {
85	    width: 100%;
86	  }
87	}
88	
89	.table-dark {
90	  background-color: transparent;
91	  &.table-bordered {
92	    border: 1px solid var(--global-divider-color) !important;
93	  }
94	}
95	
96	blockquote {
97	  background: var(--global-quoto-block-bg);
98	  border-left: 5px solid var(--global-quote-left);
99	  margin: 1.5em 0;
100	  padding: 1em;
101	  font-size: 1.1rem;
102	
103	  p {
104	    margin-bottom: 0;
105	  }
106	
107	  /* Tips, warnings, and dangers blockquotes */
108	  &.block-tip {
109	    border-color: var(--global-tip-block);
110	    background-color: var(--global-tip-block-bg);
111	
112	    em,
113	    li,
114	    p,
115	    strong {
116	      color: var(--global-tip-block-text);
117	    }
118	
119	    h1,
120	    h2,
121	    h3,
122	    h4,
123	    h5,
124	    h6 {
125	      color: var(--global-tip-block-title);
126	    }
127	  }
128	
129	  &.block-warning {
130	    border-color: var(--global-warning-block);
131	    background-color: var(--global-warning-block-bg);
132	
133	    em,
134	    li,
135	    p,
136	    strong {
137	      color: var(--global-warning-block-text);
138	    }
139	
140	    h1,
141	    h2,
142	    h3,
143	    h4,
144	    h5,
145	    h6 {
146	      color: var(--global-warning-block-title);
147	    }
148	  }
149	
150	  &.block-danger {
151	    border-color: var(--global-danger-block);
152	    background-color: var(--global-danger-block-bg);
153	
154	    em,
155	    li,
156	    p,
157	    strong {
158	      color: var(--global-danger-block-text);
159	    }
160	
161	    h1,
162	    h2,
163	    h3,
164	    h4,
165	    h5,
166	    h6 {
167	      color: var(--global-danger-block-title);
168	    }
169	  }
170	}
171	
172	// Checklist
173	
174	ul.task-list {
175	  list-style-type: none; /* Remove bullets from all levels */
176	}
177	
178	ul.task-list > li ul {
179	  /* Nested lists within .task-list */
180	  padding-inline-start: 1.5rem;
181	}
182	
183	ul.task-list input[type="checkbox"] {
184	  margin: 0.275rem 0.5rem 0.5rem -1rem;
185	  vertical-align: middle;
186	}
187	
188	// Math
189	
190	.equation {
191	  margin-bottom: 1rem;
192	  text-align: center;
193	}
194	
195	// Caption
196	
197	.caption {
198	  font-size: 0.875rem;
199	  margin-top: 0.75rem;
200	  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
201	  text-align: center;
202	}
203	
204	// Card
205	
206	.card {
207	  background-color: var(--global-card-bg-color);
208	
209	  .card-img {
210	    width: 100%;
211	    padding-top: 1.25rem;
212	  }
213	
214	  .card-title {
215	    color: var(--global-text-color);
216	  }
217	
218	  .card-body {
219	    padding: 1.25rem 1.25rem 1.25rem 1.25rem;
220	  }
221	}
222	
223	// Citation
224	
225	.citation,
226	.citation-number {
227	  color: var(--global-theme-color);
228	}
229	
230	// Profile
231	
232	.profile {
233	  width: 100%;
234	
235	  .more-info {
236	    margin-bottom: 5px;
237	    margin-top: 5px;
238	    font-family: monospace;
239	
240	    p {
241	      display: inline-block;
242	      margin: 0;
243	    }
244	  }
245	}
246	
247	.profile.float-right {
248	  margin-left: 1rem;
249	}
250	
251	.profile.float-left {
252	  margin-right: 1rem;
253	}
254	
255	@media (min-width: 576px) {
256	  .profile {
257	    width: 30%;
258	
259	    .address {
260	      p {
261	        display: block;
262	      }
263	    }
264	  }
265	}
266	
267	.post-description {
268	  margin-bottom: 2rem;
269	  font-size: 0.875rem;
270	
271	  a {
272	    color: inherit;
273	
274	    &:hover {
275	      color: var(--global-theme-color);
276	      text-decoration: none;
277	    }
278	  }
279	}
280	
281	// Navbar customization
282	
283	.navbar {
284	  box-shadow: none;
285	  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--global-divider-color);
286	  background-color: var(--global-bg-color);
287	  opacity: 0.95;
288	}
289	
290	.navbar .dropdown-menu {
291	  background-color: var(--global-bg-color);
292	  border: 1px solid var(--global-divider-color);
293	
294	  a:not(.active) {
295	    color: var(--global-text-color);
296	  }
297	
298	  a:hover {
299	    color: var(--global-hover-color);
300	  }
301	
302	  .dropdown-divider {
303	    border-top: 1px solid var(--global-divider-color) !important;
304	  }
305	}
306	
307	.dropdown-item {
308	  color: var(--global-text-color);
309	
310	  &:hover {
311	    color: var(--global-hover-color);
312	    background-color: var(--global-bg-color);
313	  }
314	}
315	
316	.navbar.navbar-light {
317	  a {
318	    &:hover {
319	      text-decoration: none;
320	    }
321	  }
322	
323	  .navbar-brand {
324	    color: var(--global-text-color);
325	  }
326	
327	  .navbar-nav .nav-item .nav-link {
328	    color: var(--global-text-color);
329	
330	    &:hover {
331	      color: var(--global-hover-color);
332	    }
333	  }
334	
335	  .navbar-nav .nav-item.active > .nav-link {
336	    background-color: inherit;
337	    font-weight: bolder;
338	    color: var(--global-theme-color);
339	
340	    &:hover {
341	      color: var(--global-hover-color);
342	    }
343	  }
344	
345	  .navbar-brand.social {
346	    padding-bottom: 0;
347	    padding-top: 0;
348	    font-size: 1.7rem;
349	
350	    a {
351	      i::before {
352	        color: var(--global-text-color);
353	        transition-property: all 0.2s ease-in-out;
354	      }
355	
356	      &:hover {
357	        i::before {
358	          color: var(--global-theme-color);
359	        }
360	      }
361	    }
362	  }
363	}
364	
365	.navbar-toggler {
366	  .icon-bar {
367	    display: block;
368	    width: 22px;
369	    height: 2px;
370	    background-color: var(--global-text-color);
371	    border-radius: 1px;
372	    margin-bottom: 4px;
373	    transition: all 0.2s;
374	  }
375	
376	  .top-bar {
377	    transform: rotate(45deg);
378	    transform-origin: 10% 10%;
379	  }
380	
381	  .middle-bar {
382	    opacity: 0;
383	  }
384	
385	  .bottom-bar {
386	    transform: rotate(-45deg);
387	    transform-origin: 10% 90%;
388	  }
389	}
390	
391	.navbar-toggler.collapsed {
392	  .top-bar {
393	    transform: rotate(0);
394	  }
395	
396	  .middle-bar {
397	    opacity: 1;
398	  }
399	
400	  .bottom-bar {
401	    transform: rotate(0);
402	  }
403	}
404	
405	#light-toggle,
406	#search-toggle {
407	  padding: 0;
408	  border: 0;
409	  background-color: inherit;
410	  color: var(--global-text-color);
411	
412	  &:hover {
413	    color: var(--global-hover-color);
414	  }
415	}
416	
417	// Social (bottom)
418	
419	.social {
420	  text-align: left;
421	
422	  .contact-icons {
423	    font-size: 2rem;
424	    margin-bottom: 5px;
425	
426	    a {
427	      i::before {
428	        color: var(--global-text-color);
429	        transition-property: all 0.2s ease-in-out;
430	      }
431	
432	      &:hover {
433	        i::before {
434	          color: var(--global-hover-color);
435	        }
436	      }
437	    }
438	  }
439	
440	  .contact-note {
441	    font-size: 0.8rem;
442	  }
443	}
444	
445	.wechat-modal {
446	  display: none;
447	  position: fixed;
448	  z-index: 1;
449	  padding-top: 100px;
450	  left: 0;
451	  top: 0;
452	  width: 100%;
453	  height: 100%;
454	  overflow: auto;
455	  background-color: rgb(0, 0, 0);
456	  background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8);
457	}
458	
459	.wechat-modal > img {
460	  display: block;
461	  position: relative;
462	  top: 50%;
463	  left: 50%;
464	  width: 33%;
465	  max-width: 400px;
466	  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
467	}
468	
469	@media only screen and (max-width: 400px) {
470	  .wechat-modal > img {
471	    width: 100%;
472	  }
473	}
474	
475	// Footer
476	footer.fixed-bottom {
477	  background-color: var(--global-footer-bg-color);
478	  font-size: 0.75rem;
479	
480	  .container {
481	    color: var(--global-footer-text-color);
482	    padding-top: 9px;
483	    padding-bottom: 8px;
484	    text-align: center;
485	  }
486	
487	  a {
488	    color: var(--global-footer-link-color);
489	
490	    &:hover {
491	      color: var(--global-theme-color);
492	      text-decoration: none;
493	    }
494	  }
495	}
496	
497	footer.sticky-bottom {
498	  border-top: 1px solid var(--global-divider-color);
499	  padding-top: 40px;
500	  padding-bottom: 40px;
501	  font-size: 0.9rem;
502	
503	  .container {
504	    text-align: center;
505	  }
506	}
507	
508	// CV
509	
510	.cv {
511	  margin-bottom: 40px;
512	
513	  .card {
514	    background-color: var(--global-card-bg-color);
515	    border: 1px solid var(--global-divider-color);
516	
517	    .list-group-item {
518	      background-color: inherit;
519	      border-color: var(--global-divider-color);
520	
521	      .badge {
522	        color: var(--global-card-bg-color) !important;
523	        background-color: var(--global-theme-color) !important;
524	      }
525	    }
526	  }
527	}
528	
529	.table-cv-map {
530	  background-color: transparent;
531	  border: none;
532	  color: var(--global-text-color);
533	}
534	
535	.date-column {
536	  width: 75px;
537	  transform: translateX(-15px) translateY(-5px);
538	}
539	
540	// Repositories
541	
542	@media (min-width: 768px) {
543	  .repo {
544	    max-width: 50%;
545	  }
546	}
547	
548	// Blog
549	
550	.header-bar {
551	  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--global-divider-color);
552	  text-align: center;
553	  padding-top: 2rem;
554	  padding-bottom: 3rem;
555	
556	  h1 {
557	    color: var(--global-theme-color);
558	    font-size: 5rem;
559	  }
560	}
561	
562	.tag-category-list {
563	  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--global-divider-color);
564	  text-align: center;
565	  padding-top: 1rem;
566	
567	  ul {
568	    justify-content: center;
569	    display: flow-root;
570	
571	    p,
572	    li {
573	      list-style: none;
574	      display: inline-block;
575	      padding: 1rem 0.5rem;
576	      color: var(--global-text-color-light);
577	    }
578	  }
579	}
580	
581	.post-title {
582	  mjx-container[jax="CHTML"][display="true"] {
583	    display: unset;
584	  }
585	}
586	
587	.post-list {
588	  margin: 0;
589	  margin-bottom: 40px;
590	  padding: 0;
591	
592	  li {
593	    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--global-divider-color);
594	    list-style: none;
595	    padding-top: 2rem;
596	    padding-bottom: 2rem;
597	
598	    .post-meta {
599	      color: var(--global-text-color-light);
600	      font-size: 0.875rem;
601	      margin-bottom: 0;
602	    }
603	
604	    .post-tags {
605	      color: var(--global-text-color-light);
606	      font-size: 0.875rem;
607	      padding-top: 0.25rem;
608	      padding-bottom: 0;
609	    }
610	
611	    a {
612	      color: var(--global-text-color);
613	      text-decoration: none;
614	
615	      &:hover {
616	        color: var(--global-theme-color);
617	      }
618	    }
619	
620	    mjx-container[jax="CHTML"][display="true"] {
621	      display: unset;
622	    }
623	  }
624	}
625	
626	.pagination {
627	  .page-item {
628	    .page-link {
629	      color: var(--global-text-color);
630	      padding: 0.75rem 1.15rem;
631	
632	      &:hover {
633	        color: $black-color;
634	      }
635	    }
636	
637	    &.active .page-link {
638	      color: $white-color;
639	      background-color: var(--global-theme-color);
640	
641	      &:hover {
642	        background-color: var(--global-theme-color);
643	      }
644	    }
645	  }
646	}
647	
648	// Distill
649	
650	.distill {
651	  a:hover {
652	    border-bottom-color: var(--global-theme-color);
653	    text-decoration: none;
654	  }
655	}
656	
657	// Projects
658	
659	.projects {
660	  a {
661	    text-decoration: none;
662	
663	    &:hover {
664	      .card-title {
665	        color: var(--global-theme-color);
666	      }
667	    }
668	  }
669	
670	  .card {
671	    img {
672	      width: 100%;
673	    }
674	  }
675	
676	  .col {
677	    padding-bottom: 1rem;
678	  }
679	
680	  .grid-sizer,
681	  .grid-item {
682	    width: 250px;
683	    margin-bottom: 10px;
684	  }
685	
686	  h2.category {
687	    color: var(--global-divider-color);
688	    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--global-divider-color);
689	    padding-top: 0.5rem;
690	    margin-top: 2rem;
691	    margin-bottom: 1rem;
692	    text-align: right;
693	  }
694	}
695	
696	// Publications
697	
698	.publications {
699	  margin-top: 2rem;
700	
701	  h1 {
702	    color: var(--global-theme-color);
703	    font-size: 2rem;
704	    text-align: center;
705	    margin-top: 1em;
706	    margin-bottom: 1em;
707	  }
708	
709	  h2 {
710	    margin-bottom: 1rem;
711	
712	    span {
713	      font-size: 1.5rem;
714	    }
715	  }
716	
717	  h2.bibliography {
718	    color: var(--global-divider-color);
719	    border-top: 1px solid var(--global-divider-color);
720	    padding-top: 1rem;
721	    margin-top: 2rem;
722	    text-align: right;
723	  }
724	
725	  ol.bibliography {
726	    list-style: none;
727	    padding: 0;
728	    margin-top: 0;
729	
730	    li {
731	      margin-bottom: 1rem;
732	
733	      .preview {
734	        width: 100%;
735	        height: auto;
736	        aspect-ratio: 16 / 9;
737	        object-fit: cover;
738	      }
739	
740	      .abbr {
741	        margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
742	
743	        abbr {
744	          display: inline-block;
745	          background-color: var(--global-theme-color);
746	          margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
747	          color: white;
748	
749	          a {
750	            color: inherit;
751	
752	            &:hover {
753	              text-decoration: none;
754	            }
755	          }
756	        }
757	
758	        .award {
759	          color: var(--global-theme-color) !important;
760	          border: 1px solid var(--global-theme-color);
761	        }
762	      }
763	
764	      .title {
765	        font-size: 1.1rem;
766	        font-weight: 700;
767	        line-height: 1.35;
768	      }
769	
770	      .author {
771	        font-size: 0.9rem;
772	
773	        a {
774	          border-bottom: 1px dashed var(--global-theme-color);
775	
776	          &:hover {
777	            border-bottom-style: solid;
778	            text-decoration: none;
779	          }
780	        }
781	
782	        > em {
783	          font-weight: bold;
784	          border-bottom: 1px solid;
785	          font-style: normal;
786	        }
787	
788	        > span.more-authors {
789	          color: var(--global-text-color-light);
790	          border-bottom: 1px dashed var(--global-text-color-light);
791	          cursor: pointer;
792	
793	          &:hover {
794	            color: var(--global-text-color);
795	            border-bottom: 1px dashed var(--global-text-color);
796	          }
797	        }
798	      }
799	
800	      .links {
801	        a.btn {
802	          color: var(--global-text-color);
803	          border: 1px solid var(--global-text-color);
804	          padding-left: 1rem;
805	          padding-right: 1rem;
806	          padding-top: 0.25rem;
807	          padding-bottom: 0.25rem;
808	          margin-left: 0;
809	
810	          &:hover {
811	            color: var(--global-theme-color);
812	            border-color: var(--global-theme-color);
813	          }
814	        }
815	        a.award.btn {
816	          border-color: var(--global-highlight-color);
817	        }
818	      }
819	
820	      .badges {
821	        padding-bottom: 0.5rem;
822	        span {
823	          display: inline-block;
824	          color: $black-color;
825	          height: 100%;
826	          padding-right: 0.5rem;
827	          vertical-align: middle;
828	
829	          &:hover {
830	            text-decoration: underline;
831	          }
832	        }
833	      }
834	
835	      .hidden {
836	        font-size: 0.875rem;
837	        max-height: 0px;
838	        overflow: hidden;
839	        text-align: justify;
840	        transition-property: 0.15s ease;
841	        -moz-transition: 0.15s ease;
842	        -ms-transition: 0.15s ease;
843	        -o-transition: 0.15s ease;
844	        transition: all 0.15s ease;
845	
846	        p {
847	          line-height: 1.4em;
848	          margin: 10px;
849	        }
850	
851	        pre {
852	          font-size: 1em;
853	          line-height: 1.4em;
854	          padding: 10px;
855	        }
856	      }
857	
858	      .hidden.open {
859	        max-height: 100em;
860	        transition-property: 0.15s ease;
861	        -moz-transition: 0.15s ease;
862	        -ms-transition: 0.15s ease;
863	        -o-transition: 0.15s ease;
864	        transition: all 0.15s ease;
865	      }
866	
867	      div.abstract.hidden {
868	        border: dashed 1px var(--global-bg-color);
869	      }
870	
871	      div.abstract.hidden.open {

20	          class="badge rounded w-100"

49	  <!-- Entry bib key -->

52	    <div class="title">{{ entry.title }}</div>

56	
57	      {% assign author_array_limit = author_array_size %}

59	        {% assign author_array_limit = site.max_author_limit %}
60	      {% endif %}
61	
62	      {%- for author in entry.author_array limit: author_array_limit -%}
63	        {% assign author_is_self = false %}
64	        {%- assign author_last_name = author.last | regex_replace: '[*∗†‡§¶‖&^]', '' -%}
65	        {%- assign author_last_html = author.last | regex_replace: '([*∗†‡§¶‖&^]+)', '<sup>\1</sup>' -%}
66	        {% if site.scholar.last_name contains author_last_name %}
67	          {% if site.scholar.first_name contains author.first %}
68	            {% assign author_is_self = true %}
69	          {% endif %}
70	        {%- endif -%}
71	        {% assign coauthor_url = null %}
72	        {%- assign clean_last_name = author_last_name | downcase | remove_accents -%}
73	        {% if site.data.coauthors[clean_last_name] %}
74	          {%- for coauthor in site.data.coauthors[clean_last_name] -%}
75	            {% if coauthor.firstname contains author.first %}
76	              {%- assign coauthor_url = coauthor.url -%}
77	              {% break %}
78	            {% endif %}
79	          {% endfor %}
80	        {%- endif -%}
81	
82	        {%- if forloop.length > 1 -%}
83	          {% if forloop.first == false %},&nbsp;{% endif %}
84	          {%- if forloop.last and author_array_limit == author_array_size %}and&nbsp;{% endif -%}
85	        {% endif %}
86	        {%- if author_is_self -%}
87	          <em>
88	            {{- author.first }}
89	            {{ author_last_html -}}
90	          </em>
91	        {%- else -%}
92	          {%- if coauthor_url -%}
93	            <a href="{{ coauthor_url }}">
94	              {{- author.first }}
95	              {{ author_last_html -}}
96	            </a>
97	          {%- else -%}
98	            {{- author.first }}
99	            {{ author_last_html -}}
100	          {% endif %}
101	        {%- endif -%}
102	      {% endfor %}
103	      {%- assign more_authors = author_array_size | minus: author_array_limit -%}
104	
105	      {%- assign more_authors_hide = more_authors | append: ' more author' -%}
106	      {% if more_authors > 0 %}
107	        {%- if more_authors > 1 -%}
108	          {% assign more_authors_hide = more_authors_hide | append: 's' %}
109	        {%- endif -%}
110	        {% assign more_authors_show = '' %}
111	        {%- for author in entry.author_array offset: author_array_limit -%}
112	          {% assign more_authors_show = more_authors_show | append: author.first | append: ' ' | append: author.last %}
113	          {% unless forloop.last %}
114	            {% assign more_authors_show = more_authors_show | append: ', ' %}
115	          {% endunless %}
116	        {%- endfor -%}
117	        {%- assign more_authors_show = more_authors_show | regex_replace: '([*∗†‡§¶‖&^]+)', '<sup>\1</sup>' -%}
118	        , and
119	        <span
120	          class="more-authors"
121	          title="click to view {{ more_authors_hide }}"
122	          onclick="
123	              var element = $(this);

125	              var more_authors_text = element.text() == '{{ more_authors_hide }}' ? '{{ more_authors_show }}' : '{{ more_authors_hide }}';
126	              var cursorPosition = 0;
127	              var textAdder = setInterval(function(){
128	                element.html(more_authors_text.substring(0, cursorPosition + 1));
129	                if (++cursorPosition == more_authors_text.length){
130	                  clearInterval(textAdder);
131	                }

152	    {% assign thesis = 'thesis,mastersthesis,phdthesis' | split: ',' %}
153	    {% if entry.type == 'article' %}

172	      {% capture entrytype %}{{ entrytype }}{{ entry.additional_info | markdownify | remove: '<p>' | remove: '</p>' }}{% endcapture %}
173	    {% endif %}
174	    {% capture hook_exists %}{% file_exists _includes/hook/bib.liquid %}{% endcapture %}
175	    {% if hook_exists == 'true' %}
176	      {% include hook/bib.liquid %}
177	    {% endif %}
178	    {% assign entrytype_text = entrytype | strip_html | strip %}
179	    {% capture periodical %}{{ entrytype }}{% if entrytype_text != "" and entryyear != "" %}, {% endif %}{{ entrymonth }}{{ entryyear }}{% endcapture %}
180	    <div class="periodical">
181	      {{ periodical | strip }}
182	    </div>
183	    <div class="periodical">
184	      {{ entry.note | strip }}
185	    </div>
186	
187	    <!-- Links/Buttons -->
188	    <div class="links">
189	      {% if entry.award %}
190	        <a class="award btn btn-sm z-depth-0" role="button">
191	          {%- if entry.award_name %}{{ entry.award_name }}{% else %}Awarded{% endif -%}
192	        </a>
193	      {% endif %}
194	      {% if entry.abstract %}
195	        <a class="abstract btn btn-sm z-depth-0" role="button">Abs</a>
196	      {% endif %}
197	      {% if entry.doi %}
198	        <a href="https://doi.org/{{ entry.doi }}" class="btn btn-sm z-depth-0" role="button">DOI</a>
199	      {% endif %}
200	      {% if entry.html %}
201	        {% if entry.html contains '://' %}
202	          <a href="{{ entry.html }}" class="btn btn-sm z-depth-0" role="button">Paper</a>
203	        {% else %}
204	          <a href="{{ entry.html | prepend: '/assets/html/' | relative_url }}" class="btn btn-sm z-depth-0" role="button">Paper</a>
205	        {% endif %}
206	      {% elsif entry.arxiv %}
207	        <a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/{{ entry.arxiv }}" class="btn btn-sm z-depth-0" role="button">Paper</a>
208	      {% endif %}
209	      {% if entry.pdf %}
210	        {% if entry.pdf contains '://' %}
211	          <a href="{{ entry.pdf }}" class="btn btn-sm z-depth-0" role="button">PDF</a>
212	        {% else %}
213	          <a href="{{ entry.pdf | prepend: '/assets/pdf/' | relative_url }}" class="btn btn-sm z-depth-0" role="button">PDF</a>
214	        {% endif %}
215	      {% endif %}
216	      {% if entry.supp %}
217	        {% if entry.supp contains '://' %}
218	          <a href="{{ entry.supp }}" class="btn btn-sm z-depth-0" role="button">Supp</a>
219	        {% else %}
220	          <a href="{{ entry.supp | prepend: '/assets/pdf/' | relative_url }}" class="btn btn-sm z-depth-0" role="button">Supp</a>
221	        {% endif %}
222	      {% endif %}
223	      {% if entry.blog %}
224	        <a href="{{ entry.blog }}" class="btn btn-sm z-depth-0" role="button">Blog</a>
225	      {% endif %}
226	      {% if entry.code %}
227	        <a href="{{ entry.code }}" class="btn btn-sm z-depth-0" role="button">Code</a>
228	      {% endif %}
229	      {% if entry.poster %}
230	        {% if entry.poster contains '://' %}
231	          <a href="{{ entry.poster }}" class="btn btn-sm z-depth-0" role="button">Poster</a>
232	        {% else %}
233	          <a href="{{ entry.poster | prepend: '/assets/pdf/' | relative_url }}" class="btn btn-sm z-depth-0" role="button">Poster</a>
234	        {% endif %}
235	      {% endif %}
236	      {% if entry.slides %}
237	        {% if entry.slides contains '://' %}
238	          <a href="{{ entry.slides }}" class="btn btn-sm z-depth-0" role="button">Slides</a>
239	        {% else %}
240	          <a href="{{ entry.slides | prepend: '/assets/pdf/' | relative_url }}" class="btn btn-sm z-depth-0" role="button">Slides</a>
241	        {% endif %}
242	      {% endif %}
243	      {% if entry.website %}
244	        <a href="{{ entry.website }}" class="btn btn-sm z-depth-0" role="button">Website</a>
245	      {% endif %}
246	    </div>
247	    {% if site.enable_publication_badges %}
248	      {% assign entry_has_altmetric_badge = false %}
249	      {% if entry.altmetric and entry.altmetric != 'false' %}
250	        {% assign entry_has_altmetric_badge = true %}
251	      {% endif %}
252	
253	      {% assign entry_has_dimensions_badge = false %}
254	      {% if entry.dimensions and entry.dimensions != 'false' %}
255	        {% assign entry_has_dimensions_badge = true %}
256	      {% endif %}
257	
258	      {% assign entry_has_google_scholar_badge = false %}
259	      {% if entry.google_scholar_id %}
260	        {% assign entry_has_google_scholar_badge = true %}
261	      {% endif %}
262	
263	      {% assign entry_has_github_stars_badge = false %}
264	      {% if entry.github_repo %}
265	        {% assign entry_has_github_stars_badge = true %}
266	      {% endif %}
267	
268	      {% assign entry_has_inspirehep_badge = false %}
269	      {% if entry.inspirehep_id %}
270	        {% assign entry_has_inspirehep_badge = true %}
271	      {% endif %}
272	      {% if entry_has_altmetric_badge or entry_has_dimensions_badge or entry_has_google_scholar_badge or entry_has_github_stars_badge or entry_has_inspirehep_badge %}
273	        <div class="badges">
274	          {% if site.enable_publication_badges.altmetric and entry_has_altmetric_badge %}
275	            <span
276	              class="altmetric-embed"
277	              data-badge-type="2"
278	              data-badge-popover="right"
279	              {% if entry.altmetric != blank and entry.altmetric != 'true' %}
280	                data-altmetric-id="{{ entry.altmetric }}"
281	              {% elsif entry.arxiv %}
282	                data-arxiv-id="{{ entry.arxiv }}"
283	              {% elsif entry.eprint %}
284	                data-arxiv-id="{{ entry.eprint }}"
285	              {% elsif entry.doi %}
286	                data-doi="{{ entry.doi }}"
287	              {% elsif entry.pmid %}
288	                data-pmid="{{ entry.pmid }}"
289	              {% elsif entry.isbn %}
290	                data-isbn="{{ entry.isbn }}"
291	              {% endif %}
292	            ></span>
293	          {% endif %}
294	          {% if site.enable_publication_badges.dimensions and entry_has_dimensions_badge %}
295	            <span
296	              class="__dimensions_badge_embed__"
297	              {% if entry.dimensions != blank and entry.dimensions != 'true' %}
298	                data-id="{{ entry.dimensions }}"
299	              {% elsif entry.doi %}
300	                data-doi="{{ entry.doi }}"
301	              {% else %}
302	                data-pmid="{{ entry.pmid }}"
303	              {% endif %}
304	              data-style="small_rectangle"
305	              data-legend="hover-right"
306	              style="margin-bottom: 3px;"
307	            ></span>
308	          {% endif %}
309	          {% if site.enable_publication_badges.google_scholar and entry_has_google_scholar_badge %}
310	            {% assign gs_count = site.data.scholar_citations.articles[entry.google_scholar_id] | default: 0 %}
311	            <a
312	              href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?view_op=view_citation&hl=en&user={{ site.scholar_userid }}&citation_for_view={{ site.scholar_userid }}:{{ entry.google_scholar_id }}"
313	              aria-label="Google Scholar link"
314	              role="button"
315	              style="display: inline-flex; align-items: stretch; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 4px; overflow: hidden; vertical-align: middle;"
316	            >
317	              <span style="display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.25rem; padding: 0.15rem 0.4rem; background: #f5f0e6; color: #4285F4; font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1;">
318	                <i class="ai ai-google-scholar" style="font-size: 0.8rem;"></i> Scholar
319	              </span>
320	              <span style="display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 0.15rem 0.4rem; background: #4285F4; color: #fff; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1;">
321	                {{ gs_count }}
322	              </span>
323	            </a>
324	          {% endif %}
325	          {% if site.enable_publication_badges.github_stars and entry_has_github_stars_badge %}
326	            {% assign star_count = site.data.github_stars.repos[entry.github_repo] | default: 0 %}
327	            <a
328	              href="https://github.com/{{ entry.github_repo }}"
329	              aria-label="GitHub repository"
330	              role="button"
331	              style="display: inline-flex; align-items: stretch; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 4px; overflow: hidden; vertical-align: middle;"
332	            >
333	              <span style="display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.25rem; padding: 0.15rem 0.4rem; background: #f5f0e6; color: #181717; font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1;">
334	                <i class="fa-brands fa-github" style="font-size: 0.8rem; color: #181717;"></i> Github
335	              </span>
336	              <span style="display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 0.15rem 0.4rem; background: #181717; color: #fff; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1;">
337	                {{ star_count }} ★
338	              </span>
339	            </a>
340	          {% endif %}
341	          {% if site.enable_publication_badges.inspirehep and entry_has_inspirehep_badge %}
342	            <a

344	              aria-label="Inspirehep link"

349	                alt="{% inspirehep_citations entry.inspirehep_id %} InspireHEP citations"
350	              >
351	            </a>
352	          {% endif %}
353	        </div>
354	      {% endif %}
355	    {% endif %}
356	
357	    {% if entry.award %}
358	      <!-- Hidden Award block -->
359	      <div class="award hidden d-print-inline">
360	        <p>{{ entry.award | markdownify }}</p>
361	      </div>
362	    {% endif %}
363	
364	    {% if entry.abstract %}

384	      </div>

387	</div>

1	<header>
2	  <!-- Nav Bar -->

4	    <div class="container">
5	      {% if page.permalink != '/' %}
6	        <a class="navbar-brand title font-weight-lighter" href="{{ site.baseurl }}/">
7	          {% if site.title == 'blank' %}
8	            {% if site.first_name %}

10	                {{- site.first_name -}}
11	              </span>
12	            {% endif %}

14	              {{- site.middle_name -}}
15	            {% endif %}
16	            {% if site.last_name %}
17	              {{- site.last_name -}}
18	            {% endif %}
19	          {% else %}
20	            {{- site.title -}}
21	          {% endif %}
22	        </a>

25	        <div class="navbar-brand social">{% include social.liquid %}</div>
26	      {% endif %}
27	      <!-- Navbar Toggle -->
28	      <button
29	        class="navbar-toggler collapsed ml-auto"
30	        type="button"
31	        data-toggle="collapse"
32	        data-target="#navbarNav"
33	        aria-controls="navbarNav"
34	        aria-expanded="false"
35	        aria-label="Toggle navigation"
36	      >
37	        <span class="sr-only">Toggle navigation</span>
38	        <span class="icon-bar top-bar"></span>
39	        <span class="icon-bar middle-bar"></span>
40	        <span class="icon-bar bottom-bar"></span>
41	      </button>
42	
43	      <div class="collapse navbar-collapse text-right" id="navbarNav">
44	        <ul class="navbar-nav ml-auto flex-nowrap">
45	          {% for page in site.pages %}
46	            {% if page.permalink == '/' %} {% assign about_title = page.title %} {% endif %}
47	          {% endfor %}
48	
49	          <!-- About -->
50	          <li class="nav-item {% if page.permalink == '/' %}active{% endif %}">
51	            <a class="nav-link" href="{{ '/' | relative_url }}">
52	              {{- about_title }}
53	              {% if page.permalink == '/' %}
54	                <span class="sr-only">(current)</span>
55	              {% endif %}
56	            </a>
57	          </li>
58	
59	          <!-- Other pages -->
60	          {% assign sorted_pages = site.pages | sort: 'nav_order' %}
61	          {% for p in sorted_pages %}
62	            {% if p.nav and p.autogen == null %}
63	              {% if p.dropdown %}
64	                {% assign has_active_child = false %}
65	                {% for child in p.children %}
66	                  {% if page.title == child.title %}
67	                    {% assign has_active_child = true %}
68	                  {% endif %}
69	                {% endfor %}
70	                <li class="nav-item dropdown {% if page.title == p.title or has_active_child %}active{% endif %}">
71	                  <a
72	                    class="nav-link dropdown-toggle"
73	                    href="#"
74	                    id="navbarDropdown"
75	                    role="button"
76	                    data-toggle="dropdown"
77	                    aria-haspopup="true"
78	                    aria-expanded="false"
79	                  >
80	                    {{- p.title }}
81	                    {% if page.title == p.title or has_active_child %}
82	                      <span class="sr-only">(current)</span>
83	                    {% endif %}
84	                  </a>
85	                  <div class="dropdown-menu dropdown-menu-right" aria-labelledby="navbarDropdown">
86	                    {% for child in p.children %}
87	                      {% if child.title == 'divider' %}
88	                        <div class="dropdown-divider"></div>
89	                      {% else %}
90	                        <a
91	                          class="dropdown-item {% if page.title == child.title %}active{% endif %}"

93	                        >
94	                          {{- child.title -}}
95	                        </a>
96	                      {% endif %}
97	                    {% endfor %}
98	                  </div>
99	                </li>
100	              {% else %}
101	                {% assign parent_link = p.permalink | remove: 'index.html' %}
102	                <li class="nav-item {% if page.url contains parent_link %}active{% endif %}">
103	                  {%- if p.permalink contains '://' -%}
104	                    {%- assign url = p.permalink -%}
105	                  {%- elsif p.permalink contains '/blog/' -%}

107	                  {%- else -%}
108	                    {%- assign url = p.url -%}
109	                  {%- endif %}
110	                  <a class="nav-link" href="{{ url | relative_url }}">
111	                    {{- p.title }}
112	                    {% if page.url contains p.url %}
113	                      <span class="sr-only">(current)</span>
114	                    {% endif %}
115	                  </a>
116	                </li>
117	              {% endif %}
118	            {% endif %}
119	          {% endfor %}

124	                <span class="nav-link">ctrl k <i class="ti ti-search"></i></span>

127	          {% endif %}

133	                <i class="ti ti-moon-filled" id="light-toggle-dark"></i>
134	                <i class="ti ti-sun-filled" id="light-toggle-light"></i>
135	              </button>
136	            </li>
137	          {% endif %}
138	        </ul>
139	      </div>

149	  {% endif %}
150	</header>

11	            href="{{ page.cv_pdf | prepend: 'assets/pdf/' | relative_url}}"

34	                {% include cv/map.liquid %}

37	              {% elsif entry.type == 'time_table' %}
38	                {% include cv/time_table.liquid %}
39	              {% elsif entry.type == 'list_groups' %}
40	                {% include cv/list_groups.liquid %}
41	              {% else %}
42	                {{ entry.contents }}
43	              {% endif %}
44	            </div>
45	          </div>

49	  </div>
50	{% else %}

57	            {% if page.cv_pdf contains '://' %}

72	      {% endif %}
73	    </header>

79	            {% unless site.jsonresume contains data[0] %}
80	              {% continue %}
81	            {% endunless %}
82	          {% endif %}
83	          {% if data[0] == 'meta' or data[1].size == 0 %} {% continue %} {% endif %}
84	          <a class="anchor" id="{{ data[0] }}"></a>
85	          <div class="card mt-3 p-3">
86	            <h3 class="card-title font-weight-medium">{{ data[0] | capitalize }}</h3>
87	            <div>

91	                {% when 'education' %}

95	                {% when 'volunteer' %}
96	                  {% include resume/volunteer.liquid %}

99	                {% when 'awards' %}

103	                {% when 'publications' %}
104	                  {% include resume/publications.liquid %}
105	                {% when 'languages' %}

107	                {% when 'interests' %}
108	                  {% include resume/interests.liquid %}
109	                {% when 'certificates' %}
110	                  {% include resume/certificates.liquid %}
111	                {% when 'references' %}

113	                {% else %}
114	
115	              {% endcase %}
116	            </div>
117	          </div>
118	        {% endfor %}
119	      </div>
120	    </article>
121	  </div>
122	{% endunless %}

```scss
/*******************************************************************************
 * Design tokens — Academic Editorial base + Modern Tech accents
 *
 * Single source of truth for color, type, spacing, radius, shadow, motion.
 * Consumed by _themes.scss via CSS variables. Do NOT reference tokens directly
 * from component Sass — always go through CSS vars so dark mode works.
 ******************************************************************************/

// ------------ Color: red scale (UW-Madison brand, #c5050c at 500) ---------
$red-50:  #fff5f5 !default;
$red-100: #ffe5e5 !default;
$red-200: #fbc2c2 !default;
$red-300: #f28e8e !default;
$red-400: #e25a5a !default;
$red-500: #c5050c !default;
$red-600: #a10309 !default;
$red-700: #7d0207 !default;
$red-800: #5c0105 !default;
$red-900: #3d0003 !default;

// ------------ Color: neutrals (light, Tailwind-style) ---------------------
$n-0:   #ffffff !default;
$n-50:  #fafafa !default;
$n-100: #f3f4f6 !default;
$n-200: #e5e7eb !default;
$n-300: #d1d5db !default;
$n-400: #9ca3af !default;
$n-500: #6b7280 !default;
$n-600: #4b5563 !default;
$n-700: #374151 !default;
$n-800: #1f2937 !default;
$n-900: #111827 !default;

// ------------ Color: cool-ink (dark mode) --------------------------------
$ink-0:   #0f1216 !default;
$ink-50:  #151820 !default;
$ink-100: #1a1e26 !default;
$ink-200: #262b36 !default;
$ink-300: #363c48 !default;
$ink-400: #5b6271 !default;
$ink-500: #8a92a1 !default;
$ink-600: #adb4c0 !default;
$ink-700: #c9ced7 !default;
$ink-800: #dde0e6 !default;
$ink-900: #e8eaed !default;

// ------------ Typography families ----------------------------------------
$ff-serif: 'Source Serif 4', ui-serif, Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;
$ff-sans:  'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;
$ff-mono:  'JetBrains Mono', SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', monospace;

// ------------ Typography scale (rem) -------------------------------------
$fs-xs:   0.75rem;    // mono eyebrow, small pills
$fs-sm:   0.875rem;   // mono meta, news date, stat pills
$fs-base: 1rem;       // body
$fs-md:   1.125rem;   // publication title
$fs-lg:   1.375rem;   // subsection heading
$fs-xl:   1.75rem;    // h2
$fs-2xl:  2.5rem;     // hero h1
$fs-3xl:  3.25rem;    // display (reserved)

$lh-tight:   1.1;
$lh-snug:    1.25;
$lh-heading: 1.35;
$lh-body:    1.65;
$lh-relaxed: 1.7;

$fw-regular:  400;
$fw-medium:   500;
$fw-semibold: 600;
$fw-bold:     700;

$tracking-wide: 0.08em;    // uppercase eyebrow / nav labels
$tracking-normal: 0;

// ------------ Spacing scale (px) -----------------------------------------
$sp-1: 4px;
$sp-2: 8px;
$sp-3: 12px;
$sp-4: 16px;
$sp-5: 24px;
$sp-6: 32px;
$sp-7: 48px;
$sp-8: 64px;
$sp-9: 96px;

// ------------ Radius -----------------------------------------------------
$r-sm:   2px;
$r-md:   4px;
$r-lg:   6px;
$r-pill: 999px;

// ------------ Shadow -----------------------------------------------------
$sh-none:  none;
$sh-soft:  0 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06);
$sh-hover: 0 4px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);

// ------------ Motion -----------------------------------------------------
$dur-fast: 120ms;
$dur-base: 150ms;
$dur-slow: 240ms;
$ease-out: cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1);

// ------------ Semantic ---------------------------------------------------
// Prefer reading these through CSS variables defined in _themes.scss.
// Kept here for Sass-only consumers (e.g. early partials).
$hairline-light: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
$hairline-dark:  #262b36;

```

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```scss
/*******************************************************************************
 * Themes — consume tokens from _tokens.scss, expose via CSS variables.
 *
 * Red (#c5050c) stays the single accent color in BOTH light and dark modes
 * (override al-folio's default cyan-in-dark behaviour — verified contrast
 *  ratio: red on ink-0 = 5.1:1 AA). Dark mode uses cool-ink instead of pure
 * black so code/images don't feel like they're punching a hole in the page.
 ******************************************************************************/

@use "sass:color";

:root {
  // Surfaces
  --global-bg-color:           #{$n-0};
  --global-card-bg-color:      #{$n-0};
  --global-code-bg-color:      #{$code-bg-color-light};
  --global-bg-subtle:          #{$n-100};

  // Text
  --global-text-color:         #{$n-900};
  --global-text-color-light:   #{$n-500};

  // Accent — red stays red in both modes
  --global-theme-color:        #{$red-500};
  --global-hover-color:        #{$red-600};
  --global-hover-text-color:   #{$n-0};
  --global-highlight-color:    #{$red-700};
  --global-quote-left:         #{$red-600};

  // Footer
  --global-footer-bg-color:    #{$n-900};
  --global-footer-text-color:  #{$n-300};
  --global-footer-link-color:  #{$n-0};

  --global-distill-app-color:  #{$n-500};

  // Lines & dividers
  --global-divider-color:      #{$hairline-light};
  --hairline:                  #{$hairline-light};
  --mono-meta-color:           #{$n-500};
  --btn-outline:               #{$n-400};

  --global-back-to-top-bg-color: rgba(
    #{color.channel($black-color, "red", $space: rgb)},
    #{color.channel($black-color, "green", $space: rgb)},
    #{color.channel($black-color, "blue", $space: rgb)},
    0.4
  );
  --global-back-to-top-text-color: #{$n-0};
  --global-newsletter-bg-color:    #{$n-0};
  --global-newsletter-text-color:  #{$n-900};

  --global-quoto-block-bg: #fffacd;

  --global-tip-block:         #42b983;
  --global-tip-block-bg:      #e2f5ec;
  --global-tip-block-text:    #215d42;
  --global-tip-block-title:   #359469;
  --global-warning-block:     #e7c000;
  --global-warning-block-bg:  #fff8d8;
  --global-warning-block-text: #6b5900;
  --global-warning-block-title: #b29400;
  --global-danger-block:      #c00;
  --global-danger-block-bg:   #ffe0e0;
  --global-danger-block-text: #600;
  --global-danger-block-title: #c00;

  #light-toggle-system {
    padding-left: 10px;
    padding-top: 12px;
    display: block;
  }
  #light-toggle-dark  { display: none; }
  #light-toggle-light { display: none; }

  .repo-img-light { display: block; }
  .repo-img-dark  { display: none; }

  #back-to-top {
    color: var(--global-back-to-top-text-color);
    background: var(--global-back-to-top-bg-color);
    bottom: $back-to-top-bottom;
    right: $back-to-top-right;
    height: $back-to-top-height;
    width: $back-to-top-width;
    z-index: $back-to-top-z-index;
  }
}

html[data-theme="dark"] {
  // Surfaces — cool ink, not pure black
  --global-bg-color:           #{$ink-0};
  --global-card-bg-color:      #{$ink-50};
  --global-code-bg-color:      #{$ink-100};
  --global-bg-subtle:          #{$ink-100};

  // Text
  --global-text-color:         #{$ink-900};
  --global-text-color-light:   #{$ink-500};

  // Accent — red stays red (override al-folio cyan default)
  --global-theme-color:        #{$red-500};
  --global-hover-color:        #{$red-400};
  --global-hover-text-color:   #{$n-0};
  --global-highlight-color:    #{$red-400};
  --global-quote-left:         #{$red-400};

  // Footer
  --global-footer-bg-color:    #{$ink-50};
  --global-footer-text-color:  #{$ink-600};
  --global-footer-link-color:  #{$ink-900};

  --global-distill-app-color:  #{$ink-500};

  // Lines & dividers
  --global-divider-color:      #{$hairline-dark};
  --hairline:                  #{$hairline-dark};
  --mono-meta-color:           #{$ink-500};
  --btn-outline:               #{$ink-300};

  --global-back-to-top-bg-color: rgba(
    #{color.channel($white-color, "red", $space: rgb)},
    #{color.channel($white-color, "green", $space: rgb)},
    #{color.channel($white-color, "blue", $space: rgb)},
    0.5
  );
  --global-back-to-top-text-color: #{$ink-0};
  --global-newsletter-bg-color:    #{$ink-50};
  --global-newsletter-text-color:  #{$ink-900};

  --global-tip-block:         #42b983;
  --global-tip-block-bg:      #1a2e24;
  --global-tip-block-text:    #a9e6c5;
  --global-tip-block-title:   #6ad0a0;
  --global-warning-block:     #e7c000;
  --global-warning-block-bg:  #2b240e;
  --global-warning-block-text: #f1d880;
  --global-warning-block-title: #e7c000;
  --global-danger-block:      #e25a5a;
  --global-danger-block-bg:   #2b1414;
  --global-danger-block-text: #f28e8e;
  --global-danger-block-title: #e25a5a;

  .repo-img-light { display: none; }
  .repo-img-dark  { display: block; }
}

html[data-theme-setting="dark"] {
  #light-toggle-system { display: none; }
  #light-toggle-dark {
    padding-left: 10px;
    padding-top: 12px;
    display: block;
  }
  #light-toggle-light { display: none; }

  #back-to-top {
    color: var(--global-back-to-top-text-color);
    background: var(--global-back-to-top-bg-color);
  }
}

html[data-theme-setting="light"] {
  #light-toggle-system { display: none; }
  #light-toggle-dark   { display: none; }
  #light-toggle-light {
    padding-left: 10px;
    padding-top: 12px;
    display: block;
  }
}

```

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```scss
/*******************************************************************************
 * Content layout — site frame, homepage sections, hero utilities.
 ******************************************************************************/

body {
  padding-bottom: 70px;
  color: var(--global-text-color);
  background-color: var(--global-bg-color);

  h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6 {
    scroll-margin-top: 66px;
  }
}

body.fixed-top-nav {
  padding-top: 56px;
}

body.sticky-bottom-footer {
  padding-bottom: 0;
}

.container {
  max-width: $max-content-width;
}

/******************************************************************************
 * Homepage hero & profile card
 ******************************************************************************/

.profile {
  img {
    width: 100%;
  }
}

.profile__card {
  border: 1px solid var(--hairline);
  border-radius: $r-sm;
  padding: $sp-3;
  background: var(--global-card-bg-color);
  transition: border-color $dur-base $ease-out;

  &:hover {
    border-color: var(--global-theme-color);
  }

  .more-info {
    margin-top: $sp-2;
    font-family: $ff-mono;
    font-size: $fs-xs;
    color: var(--mono-meta-color);
    text-align: center;

    p {
      margin: 0;
    }
  }
}

.eyebrow {
  font-family: $ff-sans;
  font-size: $fs-xs;
  font-weight: $fw-semibold;
  letter-spacing: $tracking-wide;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--mono-meta-color);
  margin: 0 0 $sp-2;
}

.highlight-text {
  color: var(--global-theme-color);
  font-weight: $fw-semibold;
}

.bio {
  max-width: 64ch;
  line-height: $lh-relaxed;
  color: var(--global-text-color);

  p {
    margin-bottom: $sp-4;
  }

  a {
    color: var(--global-theme-color);
    text-decoration: none;
    border-bottom: 1px solid transparent;
    transition: border-color $dur-base $ease-out;

    &:hover {
      border-bottom-color: var(--global-theme-color);
      text-decoration: none;
    }
  }
}

.inline-logo {
  height: 1em;
  width: auto;
  vertical-align: -0.15em;
  margin: 0 0.15em;
  display: inline-block;
}

.meta-strip {
  list-style: none;
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: $sp-2 $sp-4;
  margin: $sp-4 0 0;
  padding: 0;
  font-family: $ff-mono;
  font-size: $fs-xs;
  color: var(--mono-meta-color);

  li {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    margin: 0;

    &:not(:last-child)::after {
      content: '·';
      margin-left: $sp-4;
      opacity: 0.6;
    }
  }
}

.section-rule {
  border: 0;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--hairline);
  margin: $sp-6 0 $sp-5;
}

.home-section {
  margin-top: $sp-6;

  > h6 {
    font-family: $ff-sans;
    font-size: $fs-xs;
    font-weight: $fw-semibold;
    letter-spacing: $tracking-wide;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--mono-meta-color);
    display: inline-block;
    padding-bottom: $sp-2;
    margin: 0 0 $sp-4;

    // Kill the legacy ornamental underline — let section-rule do the work.
    &::after {
      content: none;
    }

    a {
      color: inherit;
      text-decoration: none;
      border-bottom: 1px solid transparent;
      transition: border-color $dur-base $ease-out;

      &:hover {
        border-bottom-color: var(--global-theme-color);
      }
    }
  }
}

// Footer ornament (hosts ClusterMaps widget at low emphasis)
.footer__ornament {
  margin-top: $sp-7;
  padding-top: $sp-5;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--hairline);
  opacity: 0.4;
  transition: opacity $dur-slow $ease-out;
  text-align: center;

  &:hover {
    opacity: 0.75;
  }
}

.mono-meta {
  font-family: $ff-mono;
  font-size: $fs-xs;
  color: var(--mono-meta-color);
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}

```

```scss
/*******************************************************************************
 * CV — Academic Editorial timeline.
 *
 * Sections render as <section class="cv-section"> with a serif title and a
 * hairline rule. Time-table entries use a CSS grid with a mono year gutter
 * on the left, institution/role/items on the right.
 ******************************************************************************/

// ------------ Section wrapper ---------------------------------------------
.cv-section {
  margin-top: $sp-7;
  margin-bottom: $sp-5;

  &:first-child { margin-top: $sp-5; }

  .cv-section__title {
    font-family: $ff-serif;
    font-size: $fs-xl;
    font-weight: $fw-semibold;
    color: var(--global-text-color);
    margin: 0 0 $sp-4;
    padding-bottom: $sp-3;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--hairline);
    letter-spacing: -0.005em;
  }
}

// ------------ Anchor (offset so #id scrolls below the fixed nav) ---------
a.anchor {
  display: block;
  position: relative;
  top: -50px;
  visibility: hidden;
}

// ------------ Time-table entries ------------------------------------------
// Structure emitted by _includes/cv/time_table.liquid:
//   <ul.card-text.font-weight-light.list-group.list-group-flush>
//     <li.list-group-item>
//       <div.row>
//         <div.col-xs-2.cl-sm-2.col-md-2.text-center> ← year badge
//         <div.col-xs-10.cl-sm-10.col-md-10>        ← title / institution / items
//
// We override the Bootstrap grid with a CSS grid so year + content align
// cleanly on a shared baseline.

.cv-section ul.list-group,
.cv-section ul.list-group-flush {
  list-style: none;
  padding: 0;
  margin: 0;
  background: transparent;

  > li.list-group-item {
    background: transparent;
    border: 0;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--hairline);
    padding: $sp-5 0;

    &:first-child { border-top: 0; }

    > .row {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 6.5rem 1fr;
      gap: $sp-4;
      margin: 0;
      align-items: baseline;

      // Kill Bootstrap col-sm-* width; let grid handle layout.
      > [class*="col-"] {
        flex: none;
        max-width: none;
        width: auto;
        padding: 0;
      }
    }
  }
}

// Year column
.cv-section .table-cv {
  background: transparent !important;
  width: 100%;
  margin: 0;

  td { padding: 0; border: 0; }

  .badge {
    display: inline-block;
    padding: $sp-1 $sp-2;
    background: transparent !important;
    color: var(--global-theme-color) !important;
    border: 1px solid var(--global-theme-color);
    border-radius: $r-sm;
    font-family: $ff-mono;
    font-size: $fs-xs;
    font-weight: $fw-semibold;
    letter-spacing: 0.04em;
    white-space: nowrap;
    min-width: 0;
  }
}

p.location {
  font-family: $ff-mono;
  font-size: $fs-xs;
  color: var(--mono-meta-color);
  white-space: nowrap;
  margin: $sp-1 0 0;

  i.iconlocation {
    color: var(--global-theme-color);
    font-size: 0.9em;
    margin-right: $sp-1;
  }
}

// Right column (title / institution / department / description)
.cv-section {
  h5.title {
    font-family: $ff-sans;
    font-size: $fs-md;
    font-weight: $fw-semibold;
    color: var(--global-text-color);
    margin: 0 0 $sp-2;
  }

  // Institution table (keeps legacy markup; drop table chrome).
  table.institution {
    background: transparent !important;
    width: auto;
    margin: 0 0 $sp-2;

    td {
      border: 0;
      padding: 0 $sp-2 0 0;
      font-family: $ff-sans;
      font-size: $fs-sm;
      color: var(--global-text-color);
      background: transparent;
    }

    td.institution { color: var(--global-text-color); }

    td.department {
      font-family: $ff-mono;
      font-size: $fs-xs;
      color: var(--mono-meta-color);
    }

    i.iconinstitution,
    i.icondepartment {
      color: var(--global-theme-color);
      font-size: 0.95em;
      margin-right: $sp-1;
    }
  }

  .items {
    list-style: none;
    padding: 0;
    margin: $sp-3 0 0;

    > li {
      position: relative;
      padding: $sp-1 0 $sp-1 $sp-4;
      font-family: $ff-serif;
      font-size: $fs-base;
      line-height: $lh-snug;
      color: var(--global-text-color);

      &::before {
        content: '·';
        position: absolute;
        left: $sp-2;
        font-family: $ff-mono;
        color: var(--global-theme-color);
        font-weight: $fw-bold;
      }

      .item-title {
        font-weight: $fw-semibold;
      }

      .subitems {
        list-style: none;
        padding: 0;
        margin: $sp-1 0 0;

        > li {
          padding: 0 0 0 $sp-3;
          font-size: $fs-sm;
          color: var(--global-text-color-light);

          .subitem { display: inline; }
        }
      }
    }
  }

  // Link buttons beneath an entry (papers, slides, project page, etc.).
  .container-links {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: $sp-2;
    margin: $sp-3 0 $sp-2;

    .container-link-button {
      margin: 0;
    }
  }
}

a.btncv {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  color: var(--global-text-color) !important;
  background: transparent !important;
  border: 1px solid var(--btn-outline) !important;
  border-radius: $r-md;
  padding: $sp-1 $sp-3;
  font-family: $ff-sans;
  font-size: $fs-xs;
  font-weight: $fw-semibold;
  letter-spacing: 0.03em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  text-decoration: none;
  box-shadow: none !important;
  transition:
    color $dur-base $ease-out,
    border-color $dur-base $ease-out;

  &:hover,
  &:focus {
    color: var(--global-theme-color) !important;
    border-color: var(--global-theme-color) !important;
    text-decoration: none !important;
    background: transparent !important;
  }
}

// ------------ CV MAP (key/value "general info") ---------------------------
.table-cv-map {
  background-color: transparent;
  border: none;
  color: var(--global-text-color);
  font-family: $ff-serif;
  font-size: $fs-base;

  td { border: 0; padding: $sp-1 $sp-3 $sp-1 0; }
}

.date-column {
  width: 6.5rem;
  transform: none;
  font-family: $ff-mono;
  font-size: $fs-xs;
  color: var(--mono-meta-color);
}

div.container-pdf {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: $sp-2;
  align-items: center;
  margin-top: $sp-3;
}

// ------------ CV LIST_GROUPS (skills, languages) -------------------------
div.list-groups {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: $sp-5;
  justify-content: flex-start;
  margin-top: $sp-3;
}

div.list-group {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  align-items: flex-start;
  margin-bottom: $sp-5;
}

td.list-group-category {
  color: var(--global-theme-color);
  font-family: $ff-sans;
  font-size: $fs-sm;
  font-weight: $fw-semibold;
  margin-bottom: $sp-2;
}

td.list-group-category-icon {
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  color: var(--global-theme-color);
  width: 1.4rem;
  padding-right: $sp-1;
}

td.list-group-name {
  font-family: $ff-serif;
  font-size: $fs-sm;
  color: var(--global-text-color);
}

td.list-group-level {
  font-family: $ff-mono;
  font-size: $fs-xs;
  padding-left: $sp-2;
  color: var(--mono-meta-color);
}

td.list-group-school {
  font-size: $fs-xs;
  padding-left: $sp-2;
  text-align: center;
  color: var(--mono-meta-color);
}

p.list-group-time {
  font-family: $ff-mono;
  font-size: $fs-xs;
  padding-left: $sp-2;
  color: var(--mono-meta-color);
}

td.list-group-link {
  padding-left: $sp-2;
}

// ------------ CV TOC (optional, used by some templates) ------------------
ul.timeline {
  margin-top: $sp-5;
  margin-bottom: $sp-5;
}

ul.timeline li {
  position: relative;
  min-height: 2.2rem;
  color: var(--global-text-color);
  list-style-position: inside;
  font-family: $ff-serif;
}

span.badge-toc {
  display: inline-block;
  inline-size: fit-content;
  color: var(--global-bg-color);
  background-color: var(--global-theme-color);
  border-radius: $r-sm;
  padding: $sp-1 $sp-2;
  font-family: $ff-mono;
  font-size: $fs-xs;
  font-weight: $fw-bold !important;
  letter-spacing: 0.03em;
}

ul.timeline li::before {
  content: "";
  min-height: 2.5rem;
  width: 1px;
  background: var(--hairline);
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0;
  position: absolute;
  left: 2px;
  top: -0.5rem;
}

// ------------ Mobile: collapse year gutter --------------------------------
@media (max-width: 576px) {
  .cv-section ul.list-group > li.list-group-item > .row,
  .cv-section ul.list-group-flush > li.list-group-item > .row {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    gap: $sp-2;
  }
}

```

```liquid
---
layout: default
---
<div class="post">
  <header class="post-header about-header">
    {% if page.eyebrow or site.eyebrow or page.profile.department %}
      <p class="eyebrow">
        {%- if page.eyebrow -%}
          {{ page.eyebrow }}
        {%- else -%}
          PhD Candidate · CEE · UW–Madison
        {%- endif -%}
      </p>
    {% else %}
      <p class="eyebrow">PhD Candidate · CEE · UW–Madison</p>
    {% endif %}

    <h1 class="post-title about-title">
      {% if site.title == 'blank' %}
        <span class="font-weight-bold">{{ site.first_name }}</span> {{ site.middle_name }}
        {{ site.last_name }}
      {% else %}
        {{ site.title }}
      {% endif %}
    </h1>

    <div class="desc about-subtitle">{{ page.subtitle }}</div>

    <!-- Social -->
    {% if page.social %}
      <div class="social" style="text-align: left; margin-top: 0.5rem;">
        <div class="contact-icons">{% include social.liquid %}</div>
        <div class="contact-note">{{ site.contact_note }}</div>
      </div>
    {% endif %}

    {% if site.newsletter.enabled and site.footer_fixed %}
      {% include scripts/newsletter.liquid center=true %}
    {% endif %}
  </header>

  <article>
    {% if page.profile %}
      <div class="profile float-{% if page.profile.align == 'left' %}left{% else %}right{% endif %}">
        <div class="profile__card">
          {% if page.profile.image %}
            {% assign profile_image_path = page.profile.image | prepend: 'assets/img/' %}
            {% if page.profile.image_circular %}
              {% assign profile_image_class = 'img-fluid rounded-circle' %}
            {% else %}
              {% assign profile_image_class = 'img-fluid rounded' %}
            {% endif %}
            {% capture sizes %}(min-width: {{ site.max_width }}) {{ site.max_width | minus: 30 | times: 0.3}}px, (min-width: 576px) 30vw, 95vw{% endcapture %}
            {%
              include figure.liquid
              loading="eager"
              path=profile_image_path
              class=profile_image_class
              sizes=sizes
              alt=page.profile.image
              cache_bust=true
            %}
          {% endif %}
          {% if page.profile.more_info %}
            <div class="more-info">{{ page.profile.more_info }}</div>
          {% endif %}
        </div>
      </div>
    {% endif %}

    <div class="bio clearfix">{{ content }}</div>

    <ul class="meta-strip" aria-label="At a glance">
      <li>PhD @ UW–Madison</li>
      <li>CEE</li>
      <li>Chicago, US</li>
      <li>2025—</li>
    </ul>

    <!-- Recent News -->
    {% if page.news and site.announcements.enabled %}
      <hr class="section-rule">
      <section class="home-section">
        <h6>
          <a href="{{ '/news/' | relative_url }}">Recent News</a>
        </h6>
        {% include news.liquid limit=true %}
      </section>
    {% endif %}

    <!-- Selected Publications -->
    {% if page.selected_papers %}
      <hr class="section-rule">
      <section class="home-section">
        <h6>
          <a href="{{ '/publications/' | relative_url }}">Selected Publications</a>
        </h6>
        {% include selected_papers.liquid %}
      </section>
    {% endif %}
  </article>
</div>

```

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>

```liquid
<div class="news">
  {% if site.news != blank %}
    {% assign news_size = site.news | size %}
    <div
      {% if include.limit and site.announcements.scrollable and news_size > 5 %}
        class="news-scroll"
        style="max-height: 60vh; overflow-y: auto;"
      {% endif %}
    >
      {% assign news = site.news | reverse %}
      {% if include.limit and site.announcements.limit %}
        {% assign news_limit = site.announcements.limit %}
      {% else %}
        {% assign news_limit = news_size %}
      {% endif %}
      <ol class="news-list">
        {% for item in news limit: news_limit %}
          <li class="news-row">
            <time class="news-date" datetime="{{ item.date | date_to_xmlschema }}">
              {{- item.date | date: '%b %d, %Y' -}}
            </time>
            <div class="news-body">
              {% if item.inline %}
                {{ item.content | remove: '<p>' | remove: '</p>' | emojify }}
              {% else %}
                <a class="news-title" href="{{ item.url | relative_url }}">{{ item.title }}</a>
              {% endif %}
            </div>
          </li>
        {% endfor %}
      </ol>
    </div>
  {% else %}
    <p>No news so far...</p>
  {% endif %}
</div>

```

```md
---
layout: page
title: News
permalink: /news/
description: <i>Recent updates and milestones.</i>
---

<div class="news news-archive">
  {% if site.news != blank %}
    {% assign news_reversed = site.news | sort: "date" | reverse %}
    {% assign grouped = news_reversed | group_by_exp: "item", "item.date | date: '%Y'" %}
    {% for year_group in grouped %}
      <h2 class="news-year">{{ year_group.name }}</h2>
      <ol class="news-list">
        {% for item in year_group.items %}
          <li class="news-row">
            <time class="news-date" datetime="{{ item.date | date_to_xmlschema }}">
              {{- item.date | date: '%b %d' -}}
            </time>
            <div class="news-body">
              {% if item.inline %}
                {{ item.content | remove: '<p>' | remove: '</p>' | emojify }}
              {% else %}
                <a class="news-title" href="{{ item.url | relative_url }}">{{ item.title }}</a>
              {% endif %}
            </div>
          </li>
        {% endfor %}
      </ol>
    {% endfor %}
  {% else %}
    <p>No news so far...</p>
  {% endif %}
</div>

```

```md
---
layout: page
permalink: /publications/
title: Publications
description: <i>To boldly go where no man has gone before.</i>
nav: true
nav_order: 2
---

<div class="publications">
  <div class="stat-pill-row">
    {% if site.data.scholar_citations %}
      <a class="stat-pill" href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user={{ site.scholar_userid }}" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
        <span class="stat-pill__label"><i class="ai ai-google-scholar"></i> Google Scholar</span>
        <span class="stat-pill__value">{{ site.data.scholar_citations.total_citations }}</span>
      </a>
    {% endif %}
    {% if site.data.github_stars %}
      <a class="stat-pill" href="https://github.com/{{ site.github_username }}" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
        <span class="stat-pill__label"><i class="fa-brands fa-github"></i> GitHub</span>
        <span class="stat-pill__value">{{ site.data.github_stars.total_stars }} ★</span>
      </a>
    {% endif %}
  </div>

  {% include bib_search.liquid %}

  {% bibliography %}
</div>

```

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```liquid
---
layout: default
---
{% unless site.data.resume %}
  <div class="post">
    <header class="post-header">
      <h1 class="post-title">{{ page.title }}</h1>
      {% if page.description %}
        <p class="post-description">{{ page.description }}</p>
      {% endif %}
      {% if page.cv_pdf %}
        <a
          class="btn-outline-red cv-pdf-button"
          href="{{ page.cv_pdf | prepend: 'assets/pdf/' | relative_url }}"
          target="_blank"
          rel="noopener noreferrer"
        >
          <i class="fa-solid fa-file-pdf"></i>
          Download CV
        </a>
      {% endif %}
    </header>

    <article>
      <div class="cv">
        {% for entry in site.data.cv %}
          <a class="anchor" id="{{ entry.title }}"></a>
          <section class="cv-section">
            <h2 class="cv-section__title">{{ entry.title }}</h2>
            {% if entry.type == 'list' %}
              {% include cv/list.liquid %}
            {% elsif entry.type == 'map' %}
              {% include cv/map.liquid %}
            {% elsif entry.type == 'nested_list' %}
              {% include cv/nested_list.liquid %}
            {% elsif entry.type == 'time_table' %}
              {% include cv/time_table.liquid %}
            {% elsif entry.type == 'list_groups' %}
              {% include cv/list_groups.liquid %}
            {% else %}
              {{ entry.contents }}
            {% endif %}
          </section>
        {% endfor %}
      </div>
    </article>
  </div>
{% else %}
  <div class="post">
    <header class="post-header">
      <h1 class="post-title">{{ page.title }}</h1>
      {% if page.description %}
        <p class="post-description">{{ page.description }}</p>
      {% endif %}
      {% if page.cv_pdf %}
        <a
          class="btn-outline-red cv-pdf-button"
          {% if page.cv_pdf contains '://' %}
            href="{{ page.cv_pdf }}"
          {% else %}
            href="{{ page.cv_pdf | prepend: 'assets/pdf/' | relative_url }}"
          {% endif %}
          target="_blank"
          rel="noopener noreferrer"
        >
          <i class="fa-solid fa-file-pdf"></i>
          Download CV
        </a>
      {% endif %}
    </header>

    <article>
      <div class="cv">
        {% for data in site.data.resume %}
          {% if site.jsonresume and site.jsonresume.size > 0 %}
            {% unless site.jsonresume contains data[0] %}
              {% continue %}
            {% endunless %}
          {% endif %}
          {% if data[0] == 'meta' or data[1].size == 0 %} {% continue %} {% endif %}
          <a class="anchor" id="{{ data[0] }}"></a>
          <section class="cv-section">
            <h2 class="cv-section__title">{{ data[0] | capitalize }}</h2>
            {% case data[0] %}
              {% when 'basics' %}
                {% include resume/basics.liquid %}
              {% when 'education' %}
                {% include resume/education.liquid %}
              {% when 'work' %}
                {% include resume/work.liquid %}
              {% when 'volunteer' %}
                {% include resume/volunteer.liquid %}
              {% when 'projects' %}
                {% include resume/projects.liquid %}
              {% when 'awards' %}
                {% include resume/awards.liquid %}
              {% when 'skills' %}
                {% include resume/skills.liquid %}
              {% when 'publications' %}
                {% include resume/publications.liquid %}
              {% when 'languages' %}
                {% include resume/languages.liquid %}
              {% when 'interests' %}
                {% include resume/interests.liquid %}
              {% when 'certificates' %}
                {% include resume/certificates.liquid %}
              {% when 'references' %}
                {% include resume/references.liquid %}
              {% else %}

            {% endcase %}
          </section>
        {% endfor %}
      </div>
    </article>
  </div>
{% endunless %}

```

```liquid
<div class="col">
  <a href="{% if project.redirect %}{{ project.redirect }}{% else %}{{ project.url | relative_url }}{% endif %}">
    <div class="card h-100">
      {% if project.img %}
        {%
          include figure.liquid
          loading="eager"
          path=project.img
          sizes="250px"
          alt="project thumbnail"
          class="card-img-top"
        %}
      {% endif %}
      <div class="card-body">
        <h3 class="card-title">{{ project.title }}</h3>
        {% if project.description %}
          <p class="card-text">{{ project.description }}</p>
        {% endif %}
        {% if project.tags %}
          <ul class="project-tags">
            {% for tag in project.tags %}
              <li>{{ tag }}</li>
            {% endfor %}
          </ul>
        {% endif %}
        {% if project.github %}
          <div class="project-meta">
            <div class="github-icon">
              <a href="{{ project.github }}" data-toggle="tooltip" title="Code Repository">
                <i class="fa-brands fa-github gh-icon"></i>
              </a>
              {% if project.github_stars %}
                <span class="stars" data-toggle="tooltip" title="GitHub Stars">
                  <i class="fa-solid fa-star"></i>
                  <span id="{{ project.github_stars }}-stars"></span>
                </span>
              {% endif %}
            </div>
          </div>
        {% endif %}
      </div>
    </div>
  </a>
</div>

```

                <div class="github-icon">
                  <a href="{{ project.github }}" data-toggle="tooltip" title="Code Repository">
                    <i class="fa-brands fa-github gh-icon"></i>
                  </a>
                  {% if project.github_stars %}
                    <span class="stars" data-toggle="tooltip" title="GitHub Stars">
                      <i class="fa-solid fa-star"></i>
                      <span id="{{ project.github_stars }}-stars"></span>
                    </span>
                  {% endif %}
                </div>
              </div>
            {% endif %}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </a>
</div>

```

---
layout: page
title: Projects
permalink: /projects/
description: <i>The mind is the final frontier.</i>
nav: true
nav_order: 3
display_categories: [UW-Madison, Tongji University]
horizontal: false
---

<!-- pages/projects.md -->
<div class="projects">
{% if site.enable_project_categories and page.display_categories %}
  <nav class="filter-chips" aria-label="Project categories">
    <a href="#all">All</a>
    {% for category in page.display_categories %}
      <a href="#{{ category | slugify }}">{{ category }}</a>
    {% endfor %}
  </nav>
  <a id="all"></a>

  {% for category in page.display_categories %}
    <a id="{{ category | slugify }}"></a>
    <a class="anchor" id="{{ category }}"></a>
    <h2 class="category">{{ category }}</h2>
    {% assign categorized_projects = site.projects | where: "category", category %}
    {% assign sorted_projects = categorized_projects | sort: "importance" %}
    {% if page.horizontal %}
      <div class="container">
        <div class="row row-cols-1 row-cols-md-2">
          {% for project in sorted_projects %}
            {% include projects_horizontal.liquid %}
          {% endfor %}
        </div>
      </div>
    {% else %}
      <div class="row row-cols-1 row-cols-md-3">
        {% for project in sorted_projects %}
          {% include projects.liquid %}
        {% endfor %}
      </div>
    {% endif %}
  {% endfor %}

{% else %}

  <!-- Display projects without categories -->
  {% assign sorted_projects = site.projects | sort: "importance" %}
  {% if page.horizontal %}
    <div class="container">
      <div class="row row-cols-1 row-cols-md-2">
        {% for project in sorted_projects %}
          {% include projects_horizontal.liquid %}
        {% endfor %}
      </div>
    </div>
  {% else %}
    <div class="row row-cols-1 row-cols-md-3">
      {% for project in sorted_projects %}
        {% include projects.liquid %}
      {% endfor %}
    </div>
  {% endif %}
{% endif %}
</div>

```
